subject: It’s Time For Leadership
body:

| | | Isn’t it time our elected officials actually led?
[**_Michael Bennet is a glorified cheerleader for the Democratic party._**](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cillhjy-ykykmujid-t/)
Michael Bennent proudly applauds Joe Biden’s failures as if they aren’t ruining our country. Biden and Bennet have turned over our economic policies to Bernie Sanders and our environmental policies to AOC.
He is doubling the size of the IRS through his blind support of the $3.4T spending bill. **If you like the IRS now, you will like it twice as much when Bennet is done with it.
**

---
[Donate Now for a Real Leader in Colorado](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cillhjy-ykykmujid-i/)

**We are sorely lacking leadership in this country and****we desperately need a change.**
Or better yet - a return to common sense, like Senator Ben Nighthorse Campbell, the last Republican to hold this seat. He was a leader and an individual who stood up for what he knew was right.
I’m proud to have the endorsement of Senator Campbell, and I will follow the example of leadership he set for Colorado Senators.
[**_As your next Senator, I’ll stand for Colorado and America. I’ll do what’s right, by representing you. Join me if you believe it’s time for leadership in Colorado._**](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cillhjy-ykykmujid-d/)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Lawsuit over Biden China-Covid Cover Up
body:
CRT EXPOSED

[INSIDE JW]

RHODE ISLAND SCHOOL DISTRICT IS TRAINING TEACHERS IN CRITICAL RACE
THEORY

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56827&L=26008&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS82aC1wM0d2ODNEQT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTAwOTAxMTUxNg==]

As the Justice Department and FBI targets innocent parents concerned
about critical race theory, Judicial Watch just received a 53-page
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56827&L=25988&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3Job2RlLWlzbGFuZC1jcnQtdGVhY2hlci10cmFpbmluZy1zZXB0ZW1iZXItMjAyMS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMDkwMTE1MTY=]
training document from a whistleblower which details how public
schools are using teachers to push critical race theory in classrooms.

The training course for the Westerly School District in Rhode Island
was assembled by the left-leaning Highlander Institute
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56827&L=25989&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9oaWdobGFuZGVyaW5zdGl0dXRlLm9yZy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMDkwMTE1MTY=]
and cites quotes from Bettina Love
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56827&L=25990&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9iZXR0aW5hbG92ZS5jb20vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMDA5MDExNTE2],
from whom the Biden administration
distanced itself publicly after her statements equating
“whiteness” to oppression
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56827&L=25991&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmF0aW9uYWxyZXZpZXcuY29tL2Nvcm5lci9hYm9saXNoaW5nLWFtZXJpY2EtYmlkZW4tYW5kLWJldHRpbmEtbG92ZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMDkwMTE1MTY=].

The document reveals the following:

* The training course for teachers, entitled “Culturally
Responsive & Sustaining Pedagogy” is taught by Vera De Jesus and
Michaela Comella, partners at the Highlander Institute, which has an
about section
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56827&L=25992&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9oaWdobGFuZGVyaW5zdGl0dXRlLm9yZy93b3JrLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMTAwOTAxMTUxNg==]
on their website
that describes itself as:

Highlander Institute partners with communities to imagine and create
more equitable, relevant, and effective schools.

Highlander Institute is named after the Highlander Folk School, a
social justice leadership training school and cultural center located
in New Market, Tennessee known for its role during the Civil Rights
Movement.

* The training course claims that there are “unfortunate truths
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56827&L=26009&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3Job2RlLWlzbGFuZC1jcnQtdGVhY2hlci10cmFpbmluZy1zZXB0ZW1iZXItMjAyMS1wZy01L13igJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMDkwMTE1MTY=
about the history of Rhode Island and the United States.
* The training course notes that there is “systemic inequity
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56827&L=25994&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3Job2RlLWlzbGFuZC1jcnQtdGVhY2hlci10cmFpbmluZy1zZXB0ZW1iZXItMjAyMS1wZy02L13igJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMDkwMTE1MTY=
that must be overcome in the school system.
* The training course asks teachers “How does systemic racism
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56827&L=25995&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3Job2RlLWlzbGFuZC1jcnQtdGVhY2hlci10cmFpbmluZy1zZXB0ZW1iZXItMjAyMS1wZy0xMC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMDkwMTE1MTY=]
manifest
itself in the education experience for students?”
* The training course links
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56827&L=25996&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3Job2RlLWlzbGFuZC1jcnQtdGVhY2hlci10cmFpbmluZy1zZXB0ZW1iZXItMjAyMS1wZy0xMS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMDkwMTE1MTY=]
to
a video called “Systemic Racism Explained

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES PENTAGON FOR VIDEOS/PHOTOS OF AFGHANS CLINGING TO
OR FALLING FROM AIRCRAFT IN KABUL

Of course, the Biden administration is running from its Afghanistan
disaster, but we intend to hold them to account for the catastrophic
surrender.

We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the
Pentagon for videos and photos of Afghans clinging to or falling off
U.S. military aircraft at the Kabul airport. (_Judicial Watch v. U.S.
Department of Defense_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56827&L=25986&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9kLWFmZ2hhbmlzdGFuLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMjU0My8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMDkwMTE1MTY=]
(No.
1:21-cv-02543)).

We sued after the Defense Department failed to respond to a basic FOIA
request for:

Images, including video, showing Afghans clinging to the sides of a
U.S. military aircraft at the airport in Kabul, Afghanistan;

Images, including video, of persons falling from a U.S. Air Force C-17
military transport aircraft after taking off from the airport in
Kabul, Afghanistan.

Human remains were found in the wheel well of a C-17 aircraft that had
taken off from Kabul. According
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56827&L=25987&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvaHVtYW4tcmVtYWlucy13ZXJlLWRpc2NvdmVyZWQtaW4tdGhlLXdoZWVsLXdlbGwtb2YtdGhlLWMtMTctYWZ0ZXItaXQtbGFuZGVkP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMDA5MDExNTE2]
to
the Air Force, “Before the aircrew could offload the cargo, the
aircraft was surrounded by hundreds of Afghan civilians who had
breached the airport perimeter. Faced with a rapidly deteriorating
security situation around the aircraft, the C-17 crew decided to
depart the airfield as quickly as possible. In addition to videos seen
online and in press reports, human remains were discovered in the
wheel well of the C-17 after it landed at Al Udeid Air Base, Qatar.
The aircraft is currently impounded to provide time to collect the
remains and inspect the aircraft before it is returned to flying
status.”

Biden’s Afghanistan surrender was an unmitigated disaster that
directly killed and placed in harm’s way our troops and U.S.
citizens. And no one will ever forget the images of Afghanis falling
from and clinging to our military aircraft. Adding to the Afghan
scandal, photos and video of this disaster are now being hidden,
contrary to the law, from the American people.

And I trust you know that this lawsuit will likely be the first of
many as we seek accountability on what I consider to be the most
humiliating defeat in American history.

JAIL FOR BANGLADESHI SMUGGLER CAUGHT AMID RISE IN MIGRANTS FROM
TERRORIST NATIONS

Biden’s border crisis has been good business for transnational
criminals and the human trafficking operations they run. One such
criminal has been apprehended and sent to jail, as our _Corruption
Chronicles_ blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56827&L=26011&F=T&].

A Bangladeshi man based in Mexico has been sentenced to 46 months in
prison
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56827&L=26012&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvb3BhL3ByL21hbi1zZW50ZW5jZWQtcm9sZS1pbnRlcm5hdGlvbmFsLWh1bWFuLXNtdWdnbGluZy1jb25zcGlyYWN5P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMDA5MDExNTE2]
for
operating an “international human smuggling conspiracy” during a
period in which the U.S. saw a spike in migrants from terrorist
nations entering the country through the famously porous southern
border. The smuggler, 41-year-old Mohamad Milon Hossain, lived in
Tapachula in the southeast Mexican state of Chiapas bordering
Guatemala. For years Hossain assisted human smugglers operating out of
Bangladesh, South and Central America as well as Mexico to “bring
numerous undocumented individuals to the U.S. border in exchange for
payment,” according to federal documents
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56827&L=26012&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvb3BhL3ByL21hbi1zZW50ZW5jZWQtcm9sZS1pbnRlcm5hdGlvbmFsLWh1bWFuLXNtdWdnbGluZy1jb25zcGlyYWN5P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMDA5MDExNTE2].

The Bangladeshi smuggler maintained a hotel in Tapachula where illegal
immigrants would stay on their way to the U.S., federal authorities
say. He then provided the migrants with plane tickets and other tools
so they could travel from Tapachula to Monterrey in the northeastern
Mexican state of Nuevo León where a fellow smuggler took over and
assisted their illegal crossing into the U.S. “Hossain was a key
facilitator and smuggler of Bangladeshi nationals and his actions put
our national security at risk,” said Shane Folden, the Homeland
Security Investigations (HSI) special agent in charge in San Antonio,
Texas, where the case was cracked. Folden added that “HSI is
committed to working with its domestic and international partners to
combat this type of crime throughout the globe.”

When Hossain got arrested in late 2019 migrants from terrorist nations
were trying to enter the United States through Mexico at record rates.
At the time an alarming congressional investigation
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56827&L=11806&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL29wZW5jZGEuY29tL3dwLWNvbnRlbnQvdXBsb2Fkcy8yMDE5LzAxLzM5NjcwNTYzMS1TSUEtUmVwb3J0LTIwMTgucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMDA5MDExNTE2]
exposed
an astounding 300% increase in Bangladeshi nationals attempting to
sneak into the country through Texas alone. The feds apprehended
Hossain after arriving on a flight at George Bush Intercontinental
Airport in Houston. He was charged with smuggling 15 illegal aliens
from Bangladesh through the Texas-Mexico border in exchange for
payment from March 2017 to August 2018. An accomplice, stationed in
Monterrey, where the aliens would stay before the last leg of their
trek to the United States, has pleaded guilty for his role in the
illicit scheme. The feds say he paid drivers to transport the aliens
to the U.S. border and gave them instructions how to cross the Rio
Grande River.

In the last few years Bangladesh has had a greater presence in the
Mexican border region though Syria and Yemen are also well
represented. Bangladesh is a South-Asian Islamic country well known as
a recruiting ground for terrorist groups such as the Islamic State of
Iraq and Syria (ISIS) and Al-Qaeda Indian Subcontinent (AQIS). The
smuggling operation run by Hossain is part of a broader crisis
involving a growing demographic of illegal aliens from terrorist
nations entering the U.S. through the Mexican border. The government
classifies them as Special Interest Aliens (SIA) and they are flowing
north via Latin America in huge numbers, thanks to established
Transitional Criminal Organizations (TCO) that facilitate travel along
drug and migrant smuggling routes. Tens of thousands of SIAs—from
the Middle East, Asia, and Africa—entered Panama and Colombia in
recent years. Nearly all the SIA migrants were headed to the United
States and most came from Syria, Pakistan, Afghanistan, Somalia,
Bangladesh, and India. Encounters with the special interest
individuals resulted in the seizure of tens of thousands of fraudulent
documents—including passports and visas—that facilitated travel
from their countries of origin through the Americas, the previously
cited congressional probe
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56827&L=11806&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL29wZW5jZGEuY29tL3dwLWNvbnRlbnQvdXBsb2Fkcy8yMDE5LzAxLzM5NjcwNTYzMS1TSUEtUmVwb3J0LTIwMTgucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjExMDA5MDExNTE2]
found.

Years ago Judicial Watch, as part of an ongoing investigation into the
national security threats created by the porous southern border,
uncovered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56827&L=16146&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY29ycnVwdGlvbi1jaHJvbmljbGVzL2NhcnRlbHMtY29ycnVwdGlvbi10ZXJyb3Jpc20tYW4taW52ZXN0aWdhdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTEwMDkwMTE1MTY=]
that
Mexico is a hotbed of Islamic terrorism. Islamic jihadists are
training in southern border towns near American cities and have joined
forces with Mexican drug cartels to infiltrate the United States. A
few years ago, a high-ranking Homeland Security official confirmed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56827&L=26013&F=T&]
to
Judicial Watch that Mexican drug traffickers help Islamic terrorists
stationed in Mexico cross into the U.S. to explore targets for future
attacks. Among the jihadists that traveled back and forth through the
southern border was a Kuwaiti named Shaykh Mahmood Omar Khabir, an
ISIS operative who lives in the Mexican state of Chihuahua not far
from El Paso. Another was a Saudi Al Qaeda operative, Adnan G. El
Shurkrjumah, wanted by the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI)
during his undetected cross-border jaunts.

Until next week ...

clean_body: CRT EXPOSED [INSIDE JW] RHODE ISLAND SCHOOL DISTRICT IS TRAINING TEACHERS IN CRITICAL RACE THEORY [==] As the Justice Department and FBI targets innocent parents concerned about critical race theory, Judicial Watch just received a 53-page [=] training document from a whistleblower which details how public schools are using teachers to push critical race theory in classrooms. The training course for the Westerly School District in Rhode Island was assembled by the left-leaning Highlander Institute [=] and cites quotes from Bettina Love [], from whom the Biden administration distanced itself publicly after her statements equating “whiteness” to oppression [=]. The document reveals the following: The training course for teachers, entitled “Culturally Responsive & Sustaining Pedagogy” is taught by Vera De Jesus and Michaela Comella, partners at the Highlander Institute, which has an about section [==] on their website that describes itself as: Highlander Institute partners with communities to imagine and create more equitable, relevant, and effective schools. Highlander Institute is named after the Highlander Folk School, a social justice leadership training school and cultural center located in New Market, Tennessee known for its role during the Civil Rights Movement. The training course claims that there are “unfortunate truths [= about the history of Rhode Island and the United States. The training course notes that there is “systemic inequity [= that must be overcome in the school system. The training course asks teachers “How does systemic racism [=] manifest itself in the education experience for students?” The training course links [=] to a video called “Systemic Racism Explained [= from Act.TV, a far-left YouTube channel. The course instructs teachers to ask themselves, “How do I challenge systemic inequity [=] as an educator?” The course goals are to “foster and sustain cultural pluralism [=], ultimately for the purpose of social transformation.” Further, its stated goal is to, “disrupt the impact of educational inequity and empower students to transform their own lives, their communities, and society.” The course highlights “A Framework for Culturally Responsive & Sustaining Pegagogy [== which includes: “Awareness” that “we all operate within an inequitable system “Cognitive Development” where teachers “leverage students’ identities and interests ...” and “scaffold and develop students’ thinking skills” “Critical Consciousness” where the goal is that students are motivated to “critical action so they can transform their lives, communities, and society.” The course teaches that teachers should focus on collectivism over individualism. In order to promote collectivism, it states that teachers may have to “gather information [] about students’ identities ...” in order to have them reflect. These activities link to a journaling activity [] where students are prompted to write about the demographics of their neighborhood. What this document shows is that yet another school district, under the rubric of critical race theory, wants to use teachers to abuse their positions to turn children into Marxist agitators. Rather than threatening parents, the Justice Department should be investigating this rampant racism being pushed by lefitst extremists in schools across America. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR DETAILS ON BIDEN ADMINISTRATION SHUT DOWN OF CHINA-COVID INVESTIGATION The Biden State Department shut down a national security investigation into China’s role in the COVID pandemic, and the American people deserve to know why. So we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of State for records related to an investigation into the origins of COVID by the Bureau of Arms Control and Verification (Judicial Watch, Inc. v. U.S. Department of State [==] (No. 1:21-cv-02147)). We sued after the State Department failed to respond to a simple May 28, 2021, FOIA request for: All records regarding the investigation into the origins of the SARS-CoV-2 virus and/or COVID-19 by the Bureau of Arms Control and Verification. This request includes, but is not limited to, the following: All reports created pursuant to the investigation. All related to the actual or proposed termination of the investigation. * All related records of communication between any official, employee, or representative of the Department of State. This includes communications with any official, employee, or representative of the World Health Organization, the government of China, and any branch, agency, department, or office of the Federal government. We took action after reports surfaced that the Biden administration shut down an investigation [] by the State Department’s Bureau of Arms Control and Verification ordered by the Trump administration in Fall 2020 to “investigate the origins of COVID-19 and whether the virus stemmed from a leak out of the Wuhan Institute of Virology in China.” On January 15, then-Secretary of State Michael Pompeo issued a statement [=] saying: The COVID-19 pandemic was avoidable. Any responsible country would have invited world health investigators to Wuhan within days of an outbreak. China instead refused offers of help – including from the United States – and punished brave Chinese doctors, scientists, and journalists who tried to alert the world to the dangers of the virus. Beijing continues today to withhold vital information that scientists need to protect the world from this deadly virus, and the next one. We’ve been very busy investigating burgeoning cover-up by Fauci and his allies: In July 2021, we uncovered [=] emails and other records from the National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID) officials in connection with the Wuhan Institute of Virology in Wuhan, China, revealing significant collaborations and funding that began in 2014. The records reveal that NIAID gave nine China-related grants to EcoHealth Alliance [==] to research coronavirus emergence in bats and was the National Institute of Health’s (NIH) top issuer of grants to the Wuhan lab itself. The records also include an email from the Vice Director of the Wuhan Lab asking an NIH official for help finding disinfectants for decontamination of airtight suits and indoor surfaces. Also in July 2021, we uncovered [] CDC records showing that Facebook coordinated closely with the CDC to control the COVID narrative and “misinformation” and that over $3.5 million in free advertising given to the CDC by social media companies. In June 2021, we revealed [=] that the NIAID under Fauci gave the Wuhan lab $826,000 for bat coronavirus research from 2014 to 2019. Also in June, Judicial Watch announced [=] it filed Freedom of FOIA lawsuits against the Office of the Director of National Intelligence (ODNI) and the State Department for information on the Wuhan Institute of Virology and the origins of the SARS-CoV-2 virus. In March 2021, we uncovered [=] emails and other records of Fauci and Dr. H. Clifford Lane from HHS showing that NIH officials tailored confidentiality forms to China’s terms and that the World Health Organization (WHO) conducted an unreleased, “strictly confidential” COVID-19 epidemiological analysis in January 2020. Additionally, the emails reveal an independent journalist in China pointing out the inconsistent COVID numbers in China to NIAID’s Deputy Director for Clinical Research and Special Projects Cliff Lane []. In October 2020, we received from the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services 300 pages [==] of Fauci’s emails, including his approval of a press release supportive of China’s response to the 2019 novel coronavirus. You can see how essential Judicial Watch’s watchdog work is in uncovering the full truth about the origins of COVID-19. And our work isn’t over by a long shot. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES PENTAGON FOR VIDEOS/PHOTOS OF AFGHANS CLINGING TO OR FALLING FROM AIRCRAFT IN KABUL Of course, the Biden administration is running from its Afghanistan disaster, but we intend to hold them to account for the catastrophic surrender. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Pentagon for videos and photos of Afghans clinging to or falling off U.S. military aircraft at the Kabul airport. (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Defense [=] (No. 1:21-cv-02543)). We sued after the Defense Department failed to respond to a basic FOIA request for: Images, including video, showing Afghans clinging to the sides of a U.S. military aircraft at the airport in Kabul, Afghanistan; Images, including video, of persons falling from a U.S. Air Force C-17 military transport aircraft after taking off from the airport in Kabul, Afghanistan. Human remains were found in the wheel well of a C-17 aircraft that had taken off from Kabul. According [] to the Air Force, “Before the aircrew could offload the cargo, the aircraft was surrounded by hundreds of Afghan civilians who had breached the airport perimeter. Faced with a rapidly deteriorating security situation around the aircraft, the C-17 crew decided to depart the airfield as quickly as possible. In addition to videos seen online and in press reports, human remains were discovered in the wheel well of the C-17 after it landed at Al Udeid Air Base, Qatar. The aircraft is currently impounded to provide time to collect the remains and inspect the aircraft before it is returned to flying status.” Biden’s Afghanistan surrender was an unmitigated disaster that directly killed and placed in harm’s way our troops and U.S. citizens. And no one will ever forget the images of Afghanis falling from and clinging to our military aircraft. Adding to the Afghan scandal, photos and video of this disaster are now being hidden, contrary to the law, from the American people. And I trust you know that this lawsuit will likely be the first of many as we seek accountability on what I consider to be the most humiliating defeat in American history. JAIL FOR BANGLADESHI SMUGGLER CAUGHT AMID RISE IN MIGRANTS FROM TERRORIST NATIONS Biden’s border crisis has been good business for transnational criminals and the human trafficking operations they run. One such criminal has been apprehended and sent to jail, as our Corruption Chronicles blog reports []. A Bangladeshi man based in Mexico has been sentenced to 46 months in prison [] for operating an “international human smuggling conspiracy” during a period in which the U.S. saw a spike in migrants from terrorist nations entering the country through the famously porous southern border. The smuggler, 41-year-old Mohamad Milon Hossain, lived in Tapachula in the southeast Mexican state of Chiapas bordering Guatemala. For years Hossain assisted human smugglers operating out of Bangladesh, South and Central America as well as Mexico to “bring numerous undocumented individuals to the U.S. border in exchange for payment,” according to federal documents []. The Bangladeshi smuggler maintained a hotel in Tapachula where illegal immigrants would stay on their way to the U.S., federal authorities say. He then provided the migrants with plane tickets and other tools so they could travel from Tapachula to Monterrey in the northeastern Mexican state of Nuevo León where a fellow smuggler took over and assisted their illegal crossing into the U.S. “Hossain was a key facilitator and smuggler of Bangladeshi nationals and his actions put our national security at risk,” said Shane Folden, the Homeland Security Investigations (HSI) special agent in charge in San Antonio, Texas, where the case was cracked. Folden added that “HSI is committed to working with its domestic and international partners to combat this type of crime throughout the globe.” When Hossain got arrested in late 2019 migrants from terrorist nations were trying to enter the United States through Mexico at record rates. At the time an alarming congressional investigation [] exposed an astounding 300% increase in Bangladeshi nationals attempting to sneak into the country through Texas alone. The feds apprehended Hossain after arriving on a flight at George Bush Intercontinental Airport in Houston. He was charged with smuggling 15 illegal aliens from Bangladesh through the Texas-Mexico border in exchange for payment from March 2017 to August 2018. An accomplice, stationed in Monterrey, where the aliens would stay before the last leg of their trek to the United States, has pleaded guilty for his role in the illicit scheme. The feds say he paid drivers to transport the aliens to the U.S. border and gave them instructions how to cross the Rio Grande River. In the last few years Bangladesh has had a greater presence in the Mexican border region though Syria and Yemen are also well represented. Bangladesh is a South-Asian Islamic country well known as a recruiting ground for terrorist groups such as the Islamic State of Iraq and Syria (ISIS) and Al-Qaeda Indian Subcontinent (AQIS). The smuggling operation run by Hossain is part of a broader crisis involving a growing demographic of illegal aliens from terrorist nations entering the U.S. through the Mexican border. The government classifies them as Special Interest Aliens (SIA) and they are flowing north via Latin America in huge numbers, thanks to established Transitional Criminal Organizations (TCO) that facilitate travel along drug and migrant smuggling routes. Tens of thousands of SIAs—from the Middle East, Asia, and Africa—entered Panama and Colombia in recent years. Nearly all the SIA migrants were headed to the United States and most came from Syria, Pakistan, Afghanistan, Somalia, Bangladesh, and India. Encounters with the special interest individuals resulted in the seizure of tens of thousands of fraudulent documents—including passports and visas—that facilitated travel from their countries of origin through the Americas, the previously cited congressional probe [] found. Years ago Judicial Watch, as part of an ongoing investigation into the national security threats created by the porous southern border, uncovered [=] that Mexico is a hotbed of Islamic terrorism. Islamic jihadists are training in southern border towns near American cities and have joined forces with Mexican drug cartels to infiltrate the United States. A few years ago, a high-ranking Homeland Security official confirmed [] to Judicial Watch that Mexican drug traffickers help Islamic terrorists stationed in Mexico cross into the U.S. to explore targets for future attacks. Among the jihadists that traveled back and forth through the southern border was a Kuwaiti named Shaykh Mahmood Omar Khabir, an ISIS operative who lives in the Mexican state of Chihuahua not far from El Paso. Another was a Saudi Al Qaeda operative, Adnan G. El Shurkrjumah, wanted by the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) during his undetected cross-border jaunts. Until next week ... clean_body: The DSCC and Democrat establishment know they can't hold onto the Senate majority without winning in Georgia. | Friend, The panicked screengrab from the Senate Democrats' email says it all: The Democrats in Washington are watching our campaign like a hawk because they know that we are a genuine threat to their continued majority in the United States Senate. Honestly, their desperation shows. They seem to be in a panic. They're sending upwards of 3 emails a day because they know that their hold on the Georgia Senate seat is precarious. It took a perfect storm for Georgia to elect Raphael Warnock to the U.S. Senate in the January runoff election, and I guarantee you that storm isn't coming around again next year. We're going to have to work around the clock – day and night – for the next 400+ days to pull off a victory for conservatives in Georgia and around the country. We're going to recruit thousands of volunteers to help us register new voters, knock on doors, put out signs, get our message out, and get our supporters to the polls. And, of course, it all takes money to operate. Democrats are in panic mode. They didn't want me to get into this race because they know that with President Trump's support and the support of the good people in Georgia, we're going to flip this seat in one of the most hard-fought races in the country. Respectfully, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. The Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) and Democrat establishment know that they can't hold onto the Senate majority without winning Georgia. I am counting on you, Friend, to help us win back the Senate. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

Donald J. Trump October 7th, 2021
Endorsement of Steve Bovo
I’m pleased to endorse Esteban “Steve” Bovo for Mayor of Hialeah. Steve has always fought for conservative principles. He understands the importance of fiscal discipline and the need to eliminate burdensome regulations that choke the economy.

Hialeah is a shining example of America’s entrepreneurial spirit. Bovo gets that small businesses, not government, are the job creators. He will fight to get government out of the way.

Steve Bovo has tackled the status quo by leading the charge to reform pensions in Miami-Dade County and successfully passed term limits on the County Commission. That’s why I know he will hold the line on raising taxes and demand accountability from Hialeah City Hall.

I also have no doubt that Steve will stand-up to the far-left agenda that looks to change America. Steve, like so many families in Hialeah, knows how socialism destroys a country from within with policies that give government way too much power over our lives.

When it comes to supporting our brave First Responders, Bovo has been front and center. That’s why the Police Benevolent Association, the Fraternal Order of Police and Hialeah Firefighters are all backing him.

The great people of Hialeah understand the importance of electing good candidates to local government that will stop the social experiments of the extremists and their reckless tax and spend agenda that’s crippling communities and killing jobs.

As Mayor, Bovo will fight for the values that are now under attack by the Radical Left. That’s why I’m asking the amazing people of Hialeah to join me in this fight by supporting Esteban “Steve” Bovo for Mayor of Hialeah. He has my Complete and Total Endorsement!

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Sorry to bother you so early in the morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Another right-wing group is running ads against me
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37303998/310678721/-2023814932?refcode=20211009.1_TM_10AV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzY2YWI2ZC1mODI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R-oEY9Rsb8ZUWleSigsDvBWNvtEe7xYVgT-l60v7UfA=)

| | Derek,

I’m sorry to bother you so early in the morning, but it’s important. We’re weeks away from Election Day, and **I just learned a Koch-backed group is launching a six-figure ad campaign against me in the final days of this election._[Will you rush a contribution right now to help me stand up to them?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37303999/310678722/-2023814932?refcode=20211009.1_TM_10AV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzY2YWI2ZC1mODI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R-oEY9Rsb8ZUWleSigsDvBWNvtEe7xYVgT-l60v7UfA=)_**

This comes just weeks after the Koch family poured huge sums of cash into this race to support my right-wing opponent!

Derek, the Koch family and their affiliated group have a history of supporting right-wing politicians.

And now, they’ve got their eyes _— and checkbooks —_ focused on Virginia.

But our fundraising has completely stalled out over the last couple days and I need your help so we can kick it into high gear as we enter the home stretch.

**A group of donors has stepped up to match every donation between now and midnight tomorrow — and with your help, I want us to raise $400,000 for this match opportunity.**

**_[Please contribute anything you can afford right now. Your contribution goes directly toward our efforts to turn out voters, defend Virginia’s progress, and stop Donald Trump.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37304000/310678723/-2023814932?refcode=20211009.1_TM_10AV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzY2YWI2ZC1mODI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R-oEY9Rsb8ZUWleSigsDvBWNvtEe7xYVgT-l60v7UfA=)_**

If you’re like me, you’re getting a lot of fundraising emails right now. I don’t doubt the urgency of those races, but let me tell you why no race is more important than Virginia in 2021.

For the last decade, Virginia Democrats have led the nation by delivering victory after victory for working families.

Right now, all of that progress is under attack. If my opponent Glenn Youngkin becomes Virginia’s governor, he’ll roll back every inch we fought so hard for.

We’re weeks away from Election Day, and I just learned a Koch-backed group is launching a six-figure ad campaign against me in the final days of this election.= This comes just weeks after the Koch family poured huge sums of cash into this race to support my right-wing opponent! Derek, the Koch family and their affiliated group have a history of supporting right-wing politicians. And now, they’ve got their eyes — and checkbooks — focused on Virginia. But our fundraising has completely stalled out over the last couple days and I need your help so we can kick it into high gear as we enter the home stretch. A group of donors has stepped up to match every donation between now and midnight tomorrow — and with your help, I want us to raise $400,000 for this match opportunity. = If you’re like me, you’re getting a lot of fundraising emails right now. I don’t doubt the urgency of those races, but let me tell you why no race is more important than Virginia in 2021. subject: Peter, I need you in this with us
body:
Peter, This has been one of the most consequential weeks in the U.S. Congress in recent times. The INGOP Congressional delegation did everything possible to stop the United States from paying the bills they racked up with the $2 trillion tax cut for big corporations and America's rich. The economic future of the United States and families - including many Hoosiers - was on the line. However, through Democratic leadership, this disaster was avoided. [**But this is a long fight, Peter because the Republicans' extreme partisanship we see happening in Washington is also happening right here in Indiana every day. Can you chip in $20 to power our work to elect even more Hoosier Democrats who are ready to create a better future for Indiana and Hoosier families?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37308074/310684101/624230061?refcode=BraunYoung.DebtLimit.FR.&amount=20&BraunYoung.DebtLimit.FR.=BraunYoung.DebtLimit.FR.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTNmNzQyZC0wMTI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v3JICXS92JeT2cUUai4yjOplSdLwPrXEkiPmbaPYsgY=) The INGOP has been working hard to stop us. Indiana Republicans have put their extreme partisanship ahead of any agenda or the future for the state. And by voting "NO" on raising the debt limit **\- that they raised three times during Trump's term - **Indiana Republicans are failing their obligation to pay their own tab. **It's clear the INGOP has one goal: **To confuse Hoosiers with lies and misinformation. They are deploying this dangerous tactic because the Build Back Better agenda is popular with Hoosiers and Americans all over the country. They want to stop Democrats from increasing workers' wages, fully-funding public schools, expanding Medicare, addressing climate change, and providing broadband internet access to all families across Indiana. **Peter – today, Donald Trump and Sen. Grassley will be appearing side by side at a huge MAGA rally to mobilize their extremist base, keep Iowa’s Senate seat red, and dismantle Democrats' Senate majority.**
Make no mistake: Trump is eyeing a 2024 run, and the first step in his plan is to take back the Senate for Republicans. We can't stop Trump from running. But we can – and must – do everything within our power to keep the Senate in Democratic hands. That work starts by defeating vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA).
Sen. Chuck Grassley will be rallying in Iowa with Trump after only 27% of Iowans said they want to reelect him to an eighth term – giving Democrats _major_ momentum to flip Iowa blue and protect our Senate majority. But after Democrat Abby Finkenauer launched her campaign to defeat Sen. Grassley, Fox News and the GOP Senate campaign arm launched simultaneous attacks against her. **If we don't fight back immediately, Trump and Sen. Grassley could seize the momentum, keep Iowa red and even dismantle our narrow majorities in Congress.**
There is so much at stake in Iowa, and it's absolutely critical that we have the resources to counter these attacks. That's why we've set a rapid-response goal of raising $20,000 to defeat Sen. Grassley before Trump and him step on stage today.

body:
January 6, 2021 was one of the darkest days for our nation's democracy. A violent mob, incited by Donald Trump attacked our Capitol as Congress met to certify the results of the 2020 election. Following the insurrection, 147 Republicans in Congress voted to reject the results of a free and fair election. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37314444/310707858/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU1Y2M3MDJkLTA5MjktZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-Ynm5ZnfV3INlbzZi5l1qjJNN5JB7svi65vWG5yy80s=&emci=529aae6e-5b28-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=e5cc702d-0929-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=16335001) **BREAKING: "Trump tells 4 former aides to defy Jan. 6 committee's subpoena"**
\--_Politico_ Team,

January 6, 2021 was one of the darkest days for our nation's democracy. A violent mob, incited by Donald Trump attacked our Capitol as Congress met to certify the results of the 2020 election. Following the insurrection, 147 Republicans in Congress voted to reject the results of a free and fair election.

In the months since, Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress have done everything in their power to rewrite history and escape accountability for the events of January 6.

Despite Republicans' attempts to block the truth, Nancy Pelosi took action and formed a select committee to investigate the attack on our Capitol. This investigation is underway in the House and is a huge step in the right direction to uncovering the truth, holding the responsible parties accountable, and defending our democracy.

But if history taught us anything, we can expect Republicans to do whatever it takes to impede the investigation and hide the truth from the American people. **Just earlier this week, it was revealed that Trump told four of his aides to defy the committee's subpoenas.**

Trump is trying to block testimony so we can't hold him or his allies accountable. We can't let them get away with it.

clean_body: Let me break it down. | | | = | | Let me break it down for you, Derek. Poll after poll shows that the Virginia governor’s race is shockingly close. One recent poll even had Terry and Glenn Youngkin TIED at 46-46. Glenn Youngkin is Donald Trump’s second coming in Virginia, so after Virginia voted against Donald Trump by a double-digit margin last year, it’s a bad sign that this race is so close. And now that Virginians are already starting to cast their ballots, there is no time to waste. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for your help, James Carville =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. subject: It’s night and day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEPASQUALE FOR PA-10 |
body:
Friend,

The differences between Scott Perry and Eugene are night and day. While Eugene used his time in office to help central Pennsylvania, Scott has played partisan politics and pit our communities against each other.

Perry has spent more time pandering to his far-right extremist friends on Capitol Hill than working across the aisle to build the best solutions for our home. We’re facing multiple crises, and Perry has shown that he’d rather listen to conspiracies than the people.

It’s time for new leadership to represent us in Washington. That’s why we’re looking to get 500 donations this month to tell Scott Perry his time is up. Can we count on you to give $10 today?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasqualeoct2021?refcode=EM_FR_211009FR_N_TE_90DA_7_NG_N_Biobox

We know actions speak louder than words, so let’s look at Eugene’s record. As Auditor General, Eugene:

- Saved Pennsylvania taxpayers over $2 billion by shining a light on government waste, fraud, and abuse;
- Cut the backlog of untested rape kits sitting in PA crime labs by 97%--from over 3,000 to less than 100 in under four years;
- Exposed abuse in PA nursing homes;
- And helped to protect children from abuse by reforming the PA Child Abuse Hotline and getting them the resources they need to be safe.

And that’s just the beginning. It’s obvious that we need a new leader who’s actually willing to put our communities first.

Let Scott Perry understand how ready you are to kick him out of Washington. Will you rush in $10?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasqualeoct2021?refcode=EM_FR_211009FR_N_TE_90DA_7_NG_N_Biobox

Thank you,

Team Eugene

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: We’re losing ground
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37317873/310720460/-2135409409?refcode=lur_template_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDRmMGY5NC0xMTI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bGw8GxVMcC3K46QzIUhN_quOR-v6VIP3GI8MGdm0eRU=)

| | Folks, when I heard that _The Cook Political Report_ shifted the Virginia governor’s race from “Leans Democrat” to “Toss Up,” I thought for certain we’d have a surge in grassroots donor support. I mean for days, everyone from the _Associated Press_ to Donald Trump is claiming that Youngkin has the momentum. _**So I was stunned when my team told me our donors weren’t stepping up to the threat.**_ If I haven’t been direct about this, let me be direct right now: I need you, friend. Democrats NEED to wake up to the threat that Virginia might fall to Republicans. Glenn Youngkin is using his bottomless bank account to flood the airwaves in the final weeks of the campaign. If we don’t have the resources to compete, Democrats may lose 2021’s most important race. [**So, what do you say? Will you step up and split a contribution between my campaign and Elaine Luria right away? clean_body: | = | | Folks, when I heard that The Cook Political Report shifted the Virginia governor’s race from “Leans Democrat” to “Toss Up,” I thought for certain we’d have a surge in grassroots donor support. I mean for days, everyone from the Associated Press to Donald Trump is claiming that Youngkin has the momentum. So I was stunned when my team told me our donors weren’t stepping up to the threat. If I haven’t been direct about this, let me be direct right now: I need you, friend. Democrats NEED to wake up to the threat that Virginia might fall to Republicans. Glenn Youngkin is using his bottomless bank account to flood the airwaves in the final weeks of the campaign. If we don’t have the resources to compete, Democrats may lose 2021’s most important race. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Let’s do this, Terry McAuliffe | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Looking Forward to Seeing you Tomorrow!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

I wanted to send you a quick note to remind you about the Meet and Greet I'm
having this afternoon,which will take place at the Brick House Tavern off of
highway 249, from 3-5 PM. I'll be talking about the upcoming election in Texas'
38th Congressional district, taking back the house in 2022, and I'll be happy
to answer any questions you might have!

I look forward to seeing you this afternoon!

Sincerely,
Wesley

endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: Team Malcolm

body:
Our fundraising this month is off to a slower start than we were hoping for
#

Folks,
Pennsylvania's open Senate seat is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2022.
The Cook Political Report, a top nonpartisan elections forecaster, lists our race as one of only THREE toss-ups in the entire country.
So we're not exaggerating when we say that our fight to hold our Democratic Senate majority could come down to Pennsylvania.
And if we're going to pull off a huge win for working people across the country, we're going to need lots and lots of folks chipping in to fuel our movement.
But truthfully, our fundraising this month is off to a slower start than we were hoping for, and we need to have a big day today in order to stay on pace for our October fundraising goal.
So we have an important question to ask of you today:
[Could we count on you to pitch in $3 to our campaign today? subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37322250/310735929/1927938479?refcode=20211009_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTk2MmY3MC0xYTI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VdWBQFK1zzkxD7b5_NuK59YbW2dok-pNwxEs6466d60=)
Friends — I have an important ask to make, and Seth Moulton said I could reach out to you as one of their top supporters. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important. **One Nation, a National Republican Super PAC, dropped another $1 MILLION on ads attacking me. It’s the latest sign they aren’t slowing down their spending against us heading into 2022.** We need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of this attack, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our 100,000 contribution goal. That is why I need your support today. Our opponents may have deep pockets, but we have something better — a team of people who I know will always have my back. And if we can hit our 100,000 contribution goal, it’ll show that this team is more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask: [**If you are able, will you split a $25 donation between our people-powered campaign and Seth Moulton? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 100,000 contribution goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37322251/310735930/1927938479?refcode=20211009_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTk2MmY3MC0xYTI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VdWBQFK1zzkxD7b5_NuK59YbW2dok-pNwxEs6466d60=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37322252/310735931/-1534947712?refcode=20211009_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTk2MmY3MC0xYTI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VdWBQFK1zzkxD7b5_NuK59YbW2dok-pNwxEs6466d60=)

Virginia’s gubernatorial race is critical to the future of the Commonwealth and the future of the country. With the election just one month away, we must all do our part to help my friend Terry win.

We see it across the country: Governors can stop attacks on our most fundamental rights as Americans. But right-wing governors take their states backward. Folks, New Hampshire was the closest Senate race in the country in 2016. Maggie won her race, beating a far-right GOP incumbent and flipping this seat by 1,017 votes -- less than half a point. In campaigns, we call that a field margin, where the winner of a close race depends on getting on the ground early and talking to every voter we can. In 2022, all eyes will be on New Hampshire. With the Senate majority riding on this seat and Mitch McConnell already spending big to try to flip the majority, we’re in for another close race. That’s why it’s so important for us to reach our early fundraising targets. clean_body: | | | Folks, New Hampshire was the closest Senate race in the country in 2016. Maggie won her race, beating a far-right GOP incumbent and flipping this seat by 1,017 votes -- less than half a point. In campaigns, we call that a field margin, where the winner of a close race depends on getting on the ground early and talking to every voter we can. In 2022, all eyes will be on New Hampshire. With the Senate majority riding on this seat and Mitch McConnell already spending big to try to flip the majority, we’re in for another close race. That’s why it’s so important for us to reach our early fundraising targets. A dollar today makes a bigger impact than it will in a month or a year because it will allow us to invest in the campaign infrastructure we need to win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = Your contribution today is about more than a dollar amount. It’s about investing in the long-term strength of this campaign and protecting our progress. Right-wing billionaires and dark money super PACs are already funneling millions into attack ads against Maggie. We can’t match their war chests -- but we need strong grassroots support to stand a chance. = Thank you for being on our team. | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Patty Murray
subject: Laced up and ready to go?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
National Sneakers Day always reminds me of why I got into this fight in the first place -- which is to make sure there’s someone at the table fighting for working families
#
_**“You can’t make a difference. You’re just a mom in tennis shoes.”**_
I’ve told this story many times, Peter, since I decided to blow right past that comment.
When a male legislator said I was just a “ _mom in tennis shoes_ ,” I didn’t let it hold me back -- instead, I laced up those shoes, brought parents together to save our kids’ preschool program, ran for office, and eventually became Washington state’s first woman U.S. Senator.
**[I can always count on this team to stand with me when it counts. Today, on National Sneakers Day, I’m asking all of you to lace up with me again as we work to keep both Washington state and the Senate blue in 2022. Will you contribute $5 right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37324751/310739777/194128358?refcode=pm_em_211009_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2JkYzk2YS0xYzI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s6W1l7HRqm-iU640GYtryhQ4nbaDzsttnvIOk4KrTIM=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37324752/310739778/194128358?refcode=pm_em_211009_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2JkYzk2YS0xYzI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s6W1l7HRqm-iU640GYtryhQ4nbaDzsttnvIOk4KrTIM=)
National Sneakers Day always reminds me of why I got into this fight in the first place -- which is to make sure there’s someone at the table fighting for working families. It also makes me think of all the other moms and dads in tennis shoes that are standing with me in the fight to make real progress for Washington state’s families.
There is so much on the line in 2022. We need to make sure our sneakers are broken in and ready to run -- _because we absolutely cannot afford to hand the Senate back to the GOP._
**[It’s time to lace up for the 2022 race to keep the Senate blue. Pitch in $5 right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37324753/310739779/194128358?refcode=pm_em_211009_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2JkYzk2YS0xYzI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s6W1l7HRqm-iU640GYtryhQ4nbaDzsttnvIOk4KrTIM=)**
Thank you,
Patty

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: This race just shifted the wrong way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
We need to step it up.
#
Team, when I heard that _The Cook Political Report_ shifted the Virginia governor’s race from “Leans Democrat” to “Toss Up,” I thought for certain we’d have a surge in grassroots donor support.
I mean for days, everyone from the _Associated Press_ to Donald Trump is claiming that Youngkin has the momentum.
_**So I was stunned when my team told me our donors weren’t stepping up to the threat.**_
If I haven’t been direct about this, let me be direct right now: I need you. Democrats NEED to wake up to the threat that Virginia might fall to Republicans.
Glenn Youngkin is using his bottomless bank account to flood the airwaves in the final weeks of the campaign. If we don’t have the resources to compete, Democrats may lose 2021’s most important race.
**[So, what do you say? Will you step up and split a contribution between my campaign and Jacky Rosen right away? We’re in a make-or-break moment, and I need your support now more than ever.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37326107/310740573/-1610280486?refcode=jr_em_nd_211009_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzRiODdhMS0xZDI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Ik_T6pETBMxq8vmcMOwqTI5KFJ9mNQU639zgpXXG2k=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Critical Race Theory – Update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/criticalracetheoryupdatefrommcpp-8126876?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
---
| Friend,

This week was a big week for us as we published a report on Critical Race Theory in Mississippi. [Read it here.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=825c486697&e=5703353baa)

Our report exposed the extent to which this divisive agenda is being promoted within the public school and university system in our state.

For too long the education establishment has brushed aside concerns about this extremist ideology by simply denying that they are teaching it. Our report provides evidence that they are. For example:
* **Several public university departments explicitly espouse critical race theory** , teaching young Mississippians that “systemic racism” perpetuates “white supremacy” in America. One department runs a course on the relationship between white identity and “white nationalism, white supremacy, white privilege and whiteness.”
* **Mississippi’s Department of Education recommends teachers make use of professional development resources that clearly promote critical race theory**.

---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1edce83aed&e=5703353baa)
---
_WLBT segment on "Combating Critical Race Theory in Mississippi." Click to watch._
| We also published a model bill to educate lawmakers on what they need to do to combat this extremist ideology.

If every liberty-loving Mississippian joins forces, we can defeat this destructive and divisive agenda. That is what the Mississippi Center for Public Policy aims to do!

Thank you for your support and encouragement. This is a fight we can win!

---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
|
---
| | [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=4209c58d03&e=5703353baa)
---

| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=27a0bdb6e8&e=5703353baa)

clean_body: | | | | | | | Friend, This week was a big week for us as we published a report on Critical Race Theory in Mississippi. Our report exposed the extent to which this divisive agenda is being promoted within the public school and university system in our state. For too long the education establishment has brushed aside concerns about this extremist ideology by simply denying that they are teaching it. Our report provides evidence that they are. For example: Several public university departments explicitly espouse critical race theory , teaching young Mississippians that “systemic racism” perpetuates “white supremacy” in America. One department runs a course on the relationship between white identity and “white nationalism, white supremacy, white privilege and whiteness.” Mississippi’s Department of Education recommends teachers make use of professional development resources that clearly promote critical race theory. | WLBT segment on "Combating Critical Race Theory in Mississippi." Click to watch. | We also published a model bill to educate lawmakers on what they need to do to combat this extremist ideology. If every liberty-loving Mississippian joins forces, we can defeat this destructive and divisive agenda. That is what the Mississippi Center for Public Policy aims to do! Thank you for your support and encouragement. This is a fight we can win! | | Warm Regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | | | "A City on a Hill: Remembering America's History" - Read Matthew Nicaud here. | "Federal Spending is More Than the Combined Spending of the States" - Read Josiah Dalke here. | "Medicaid Expansion Leads to Higher Private Insurance Costs" - Read Matthew Nicaud here. | | "How CRT Has Infiltrated Mississippi Classrooms" - Listen to Stone Clanton here. | | | "'Woke' Academics Are No Joke" - Read Douglas Carswell here. | | Douglas Carswell stopped by the SuperTalk studio to break down the failures of the Charter School advisory board to approve any new charter schools in the Magnolia State this year and to explain how he thinks we should move forward in cutting income tax. | | In the name of combating misinformation, the Mississippi State Board of Medical Licensure recently issued a new policy that vaguely prohibits medical misinformation from being spread by doctors, particularly on social media. | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | |

Team -

I wanted to take the time to say thank you. As we closed out another fundraising quarter, I am humbled by the amount of support I have received from all of you. I know that I am the candidate who can win this race and with your support we will make that happen.

These past few weeks have been busy for me as I have been all over the district, meeting hundreds of voters who are voicing their concerns with what is going on in Washington. It is apparent to me that this district is hungry for new leadership, and make no mistake about it, no one is working harder to provide that leadership than me.

Recently, everything out of Washington has been focused on the Democrats fighting over how much they want to grow the size of the Federal Government and the price tag associated with it. The radical left wants to pass their $3.5 trillion wish list of spending and will hold everything else hostage before it. Susan Wild has been awfully quiet about this spending spree, but her actions are doing all of the talking. Don't take it from me, take it from the Chair of the [Progressive Caucus ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=ca0ed5bcd13946c1987fb54bb8073b25&_e=90PHaDtAq8Jj3vos1TBi0XyRChem3LpXRYKELZhNjnRCkwm2okaLxp93P3maHwG6X_b2xIuajxK_o7Os4euOzm30vmTlbYxPXuHol_X_eoM1_s0Po4hPycbkwNXlK42rm4ijo7UXcyqOBA9C1_N05VATIVl0HnHjMWO3FavuoSNu3JYoVtCgcgOqMxBVfz04FxBsCqAiuGoSTZ_PjbHyRnR0hPvesEC1pCy_bcXruf0_v2Iu5NKSUEmVCbZuvIkqe5vMb-l1p0-8IwRUXMe7cdSo5qvoZO-eYYoQrdfE9TGo9KSlQQIbmgbeOfJriwVv) on how Susan Wild has been their best friend in passing the bill that will initiate the largest amount of sustained Federal spending ever, that the Democrats say will cost "nothing."

If that is so, why do they want to increase the size of the IRS who will in turn come after your money? Why go after Family Farms? Make no mistake about it, the left is coming after America as we know it under the guise of making the rich pay their "fair share." This 2,500 page spending spree is all about changing America as we know it and it illustrates how important 2022 is. We can't afford two more years of Susan Wild's agenda.

-Lisa

|
---
**Whats Happening in Washington?**

[Susan Wild finally talked about the Southern Border](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=ca0ed5bcd13946c1987fb54bb8073b25&_e=90PHaDtAq8Jj3vos1TBi0SKQeGvRA5KqXtJlxS2lwV8OmhPyxtr3uos4mImI_rvnBQg7f0g7SdnmqrGAWcmO5RL2HUxH5dGesd2VsDdEYCXcg_XIsqeYTI7zrCbsQtW0Esq8KQRH2ijh7nrn5JV9NQOszXQbrHSSJx3NbNcw_2Cft7jzQvHL35M7o6PAEQZvYPerQ0xyOGQSF_cmDeWy08bFNxWqyMGHR8KLXmBeryvojsLfJfo86nke3mI6mAyjAx0o7U2O2WOYnPhqYGKKsgXKT48vgregrWTOVFS01xLIuydQP94hhCY7sYBPvgKRNJEpTrOz7gcw_Nwx1yyrtyJAcuYwuzv6TLP-sJI0zW5Z2-F7qIw3gPWpyQmCxZezP82DVgDDJ7pntP90X_l_kg%3D%3D)! This past week during a telephone town hall, Susan Wild finally mentioned the crisis at our Southern Border and said she was disappointed by the Biden Administration. From August 2020 to August 2021, there has been a 317 percent increase in encounters at the border. The current surge is the largest in 20 years as illegal border crossings have increased substantially during the Biden Administration. Just this year, 10,000 pounds of fentanyl has been seized at out Southern Border. That is enough to kill each individual in America! The time has come to stop being disappointed, Congresswoman. Now is the time to demand accountability, and because you have shown that you are incapable of doing that, it is time for new leadership in this district.

[The recent jobs report ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=ca0ed5bcd13946c1987fb54bb8073b25&_e=90PHaDtAq8Jj3vos1TBi0ZHyYxLoB5dum6qOYwmE35zlu5Z0e0T1Uod_MaaGGOcZCR8LS0J17TMrg0gPdpnT89Fq7lBxAO1NcD86J7E3w170pR7xbuhKKnetj5lRbRgecnl09r5AsDdGO1aes3yb2AbMGpra_HOJrw8BjHM5GfA4WSixlBI49tEc-1Rq_keajQuZJE_1T5SfjgbimPx-TJQnCMCCH177nPzY69iDoTUcQ6D5_ZX1v5fJzmTqPNADAQN1GsR6wp8mEo5_paAeqfYFfj8MboIHQ-SlTc-GRThi8LTDSshdoVZqdR3D_xOAWAbo630uBGDZPA6q1dfw1KPIN8xW-Mh7i4eIXIkGr3ox1CXJlqKb2DPFsBCYSK8V)was abysmal again in September, and there are less women working now than there were in August. [A new study](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=ca0ed5bcd13946c1987fb54bb8073b25&_e=90PHaDtAq8Jj3vos1TBi0QMF-oPp-HU2onus-xak0PqxSBqCsKZxgMFEAaSBJhVoQCk-aZIW-cPK7DDJzr7kyi0OSqTP59Mm0l--rLu4hhSa-UTmjcQo44UPCk8ggWwSKkjw0Fe5EU5xP5kdVN16DLQembRlPPAL6GQtKx_KB-P8mXETttUZGehbwuOIZefbTt8ESB10-Kk6Tar86EJmSef2O73x6KwChRdHFIVb6XFpwmp2-M9tfmNYn8PjhVBVITweGqUc051ghLxda4CL0f_1fCSjVQCLVC2umVnow_xx962mzHJOYAXm-NKIQwjsjU8pt7JDgRieVqO7gFfoVVtHDsnuVO-zdjhCgZQM7LA8l1tq8AWfsBc-PLheUtnia-Ka7y5jJZGHlsFwPVv4lBrHbDNsQorRP9_7D0eHCLg%3D) can attribute this directly to Susan Wild and the Democrat majority in Congress' agenda. As a proven job creator and someone who has signed the front of thousands of paychecks, I know what it will take to get people back to work, and it is not bigger government.

As the democrats continue to to fight internally over how large the federal government should be, remember that [Susan Wild is the Progressive Caucus' "best friend"](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=ca0ed5bcd13946c1987fb54bb8073b25&_e=90PHaDtAq8Jj3vos1TBi0VfbyF9bmkysH8RYjkA3t8kXi_iQYj5q9acxFocFG1IM7mNSGxkNuGRBHdrcMSluj7hyZ3KvG59yFTm9dVIN7pnwPEmkEWiH7S-x8YSQZ8Nsdx_BphPGz5DDS2TtSa2QUJvKMqyg71zwbO62nl0Yc66kVGH-VH99hXjpF-Z11UM7b-o_OXs6YmT-JEjWBM3XXPJAirK7vP5lwdEf38nm0lkdxEZUj6RtQY8m5m57qg7XJpn6DFOaR32Y-_pWKABC9A%3D%3D)

Another week, and another anti-Israel democrat story. Susan Wild refuses to speak out against [leaders in her own party who make anti-Israel remarks.](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=ca0ed5bcd13946c1987fb54bb8073b25&_e=90PHaDtAq8Jj3vos1TBi0UryNgMP1pRFROfP9PEJc9-bIHQxxxCus9jm9_ZwYokaMj2Xuhc9XVqwaT6j_1ZOdEAYjyqWrttHv15uK_ZUJ4D_61FUucydC2xGBXepZnxoCwZ0lN92c1PLA85sWGQNo_YWoP1NV0h1dAhqlFGAFfMmjIwlySZSpRm8fMK3AVc5iFfa_muioQuxkyCpLVXbH9qPtZa7kZC6kCfvbunlN023-hdDKMEkzKfVEZBSd52XR4FD_-0AxYCXGVmfJtQk0RMfNnfwy9wysvVtw_0VK2ZbQL4r-HuOuTX3RPKesKqhHxJu2ksEbRu-7HX6XR6Ewvt7OlQUYi_Rv9I5nUHTsNh6H7rYEw6SHD9DnaClkosN_V6-ZRha5UgrWomriH_Fiw%3D%3D) Make no mistake about it, I stand with Israel and will defend our ally with vigor when elected.

[Americans are paying the most they have for gas in SEVEN YEARS.](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=ca0ed5bcd13946c1987fb54bb8073b25&_e=90PHaDtAq8Jj3vos1TBi0QrFJdvEQDu4EnNAfr-uKklu9gKnKjAVSdqik5kn5sjj7ZrSmgAyFEr-tkO93zQZ5OBqS7zhH5Tiw2a4Dkx0zq6SQRpH4xxx8htYbTVwqP-JHxG2IPsxjnEoPpj8x2YF5SAirZj7J6GaKHqm3zuuKL9afkcR5pUC5ovQUbaQQyRlsj3AjRrrs3kh63pkPkVl6zUi-nbL4NJVcnoGo1-uNQNlEi54x9gA5TtO8OjYBcye_sNNl_xvSsthKDzMg61_If-fJnxVCaFS54Y7jvZ2lFm7zi515253Wl2c7YKojdP5yGxXrPdkdAW797iitn-HAfJWsqOIaYvNDdk08coRyLw%3D)

**Endorsements**

_Pennsylvanians will have a strong conservative voice in D.C. when they elect Lisa Scheller, a Keystone State business owner, public servant, and mother. She is fighting to preserve the American Dream and for the future of our veterans. I look forward to serving with Lisa in Congress.- _Mark Amodei (NV-02)

clean_body: Lisa Scheller for Congress Newsletter! Find out what Lisa has been up to and what Susan Wild has been doing this week! Scheller for Congress Newsletter | | | ---|--- Team - I wanted to take the time to say thank you. As we closed out another fundraising quarter, I am humbled by the amount of support I have received from all of you. I know that I am the candidate who can win this race and with your support we will make that happen. These past few weeks have been busy for me as I have been all over the district, meeting hundreds of voters who are voicing their concerns with what is going on in Washington. It is apparent to me that this district is hungry for new leadership, and make no mistake about it, no one is working harder to provide that leadership than me. Recently, everything out of Washington has been focused on the Democrats fighting over how much they want to grow the size of the Federal Government and the price tag associated with it. The radical left wants to pass their $3.5 trillion wish list of spending and will hold everything else hostage before it. Susan Wild has been awfully quiet about this spending spree, but her actions are doing all of the talking. Don't take it from me, take it from the Chair of the on how Susan Wild has been their best friend in passing the bill that will initiate the largest amount of sustained Federal spending ever, that the Democrats say will cost "nothing." If that is so, why do they want to increase the size of the IRS who will in turn come after your money? Why go after Family Farms? Make no mistake about it, the left is coming after America as we know it under the guise of making the rich pay their "fair share." This 2,500 page spending spree is all about changing America as we know it and it illustrates how important 2022 is. We can't afford two more years of Susan Wild's agenda. -Lisa | Whats Happening in Washington? ! This past week during a telephone town hall, Susan Wild finally mentioned the crisis at our Southern Border and said she was disappointed by the Biden Administration. From August 2020 to August 2021, there has been a 317 percent increase in encounters at the border. The current surge is the largest in 20 years as illegal border crossings have increased substantially during the Biden Administration. Just this year, 10,000 pounds of fentanyl has been seized at out Southern Border. That is enough to kill each individual in America! The time has come to stop being disappointed, Congresswoman. Now is the time to demand accountability, and because you have shown that you are incapable of doing that, it is time for new leadership in this district. abysmal again in September, and there are less women working now than there were in August. can attribute this directly to Susan Wild and the Democrat majority in Congress' agenda. As a proven job creator and someone who has signed the front of thousands of paychecks, I know what it will take to get people back to work, and it is not bigger government. As the democrats continue to to fight internally over how large the federal government should be, remember that Another week, and another anti-Israel democrat story. Susan Wild refuses to speak out against Make no mistake about it, I stand with Israel and will defend our ally with vigor when elected. | Endorsements Pennsylvanians will have a strong conservative voice in D.C. when they elect Lisa Scheller, a Keystone State business owner, public servant, and mother. She is fighting to preserve the American Dream and for the future of our veterans. I look forward to serving with Lisa in Congress.- Mark Amodei (NV-02) | Lisa on the Radio! | Photos from the District! Monroe Republican Dinner 2nd Amendment Event at Relic Hunter Firing Line! Annamarie Robertone for Northampton County Council Fundraiser Bangor Area Library's 100th Anniversary Celebration! Other Photos from Around the District! Where to find me! mailto:%20pinedaforcommissioner@gmail.com?subject=Monday's%20Fundraiser%20RSVP " pinedaforcommissioner@gmail.com" October 12- Slate Belt Republican Meeting | As always, be sure to keep an eye out for future updates from the campaign and future events! Onward to victory, Team Scheller | Check out our Social Media Pages! | | ---|--- PAID FOR BY LISA SCHELLER FOR CONGRESS

body:
I’m at AMPfest in Miami, but I wanted to share a quick update with you.
| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/2ZT021cvmoJTLnv763foNtbg/s9843SpsP2b25b9siAjf8A) | Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/2ZT021cvmoJTLnv763foNtbg/s9843SpsP2b25b9siAjf8A) I’m at AMPfest in Miami, but I wanted to share a quick update with you.

**My new case against the Big Tech Mafia is about to kick off soon, and it’s a BOMBSHELL.**

[**Help fund my lawsuit against the Big Tech Mafia here.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/2ZT021cvmoJTLnv763foNtbg/s9843SpsP2b25b9siAjf8A)

I’m dying to share details of my case with you, but I’ve already been dressed down by my legal team for sharing too much already.

So without getting into details, I’ll just say that my case takes on the culture of bias in Big Tech and its **root causes**.

I was able to raise $100k to fund the initial filing and the massive volume of research by my team, which has been ongoing for the last year and a half as we have worked to file this complaint, but as soon as we pull the trigger and file the case, things will heat up quickly and I’ll need a cash reserve to survive the initial onslaught by the numerous billion dollar companies we’re taking on.

[**Chip in whatever you can today and be part of my case.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/2ZT021cvmoJTLnv763foNtbg/s9843SpsP2b25b9siAjf8A)

Thanks again for all that you do and I’ll report back to you soon!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer
