clean_body: All because of one thing... | Peter, I was shocked to see the Cook Political Report give Democrats a 4-POINT advantage in our congressional race. What accounts for the Democrats’ advantage? Voter registration. That’s why I’ve decided to divert emergency funds to our voter registration initiative to erase the Democrats’ lead. George Soros’ big-money voter registration efforts have paid off. He’s on a mission to exact revenge after Republicans won BIG in Florida last year -- and that means registering enough voters to defeat us. We cannot let the fate of our country be decided by voter registration numbers. That’s why I’ve made ending the Democrats’ voter registration lead in our district a TOP PRIORITY for our campaign. Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar Florida's 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: Campaign update for you! (photos inside)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We’ve been BUSY.
#
Happy Saturday!
It’s been a busy week for Team Erica Smith, and we wanted to quickly highlight just a few of the exciting things our campaign has been up to in the first week of October. Keep reading for a sneak peek into our week on the campaign trail!
* * *
**Women’s March**
* * *
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/20825?t=1&akid=533%2E3698%2ESv3Qpn)
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/20825?t=2&akid=533%2E3698%2ESv3Qpn)
Last weekend, Erica and the rest of our campaign team _showed up and showed out_ at the Women’s March on Saturday.
Erica joined hundreds of thousands of folks across the country who marched for abortion justice and reproductive freedom.
Reproductive rights are under attack. It’s going to take folks across the country coming together and organizing to protect what centuries of activists have fought for. We’ve got to keep fighting until EVERYONE can have accessible, affordable, and inclusive reproductive healthcare.
[**Can you donate to our U.S. Senate campaign today so Erica can keep turning up and using her voice to fight for all North Carolinians?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/20825?t=3&akid=533%2E3698%2ESv3Qpn)
* * *
**Hello Somebody with Nina Turner Podcast**
* * *
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/20825?t=4&akid=533%2E3698%2ESv3Qpn)
We’re super excited about this one! Erica had the opportunity to be a guest on her friend Nina Turner’s podcast.
[**Click here to listen to the full episode »**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/20826?t=5&akid=533%2E3698%2ESv3Qpn)
Nina and Erica discuss being “Senator Moms,” the infrastructure bill, climate change, maternal health quality, **and more!**
* * *
**$1/1 Door Campaign Launch**
* * *
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/20825?t=6&akid=533%2E3698%2ESv3Qpn)
This week we launched our $1/ 1 door campaign. **For every dollar we get, we’re going to knock on a door in a county that Trump won in 2020.** Donate $1 and we’ll knock on 1 door, $5 is 5 doors, and so on. We’re committed to leaving NO community behind and to welcoming all folks into our moral movement.
**[We have ALREADY started knocking on doors, but with your contribution today, we can reach even more people and grow the strength of our grassroots movement.](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/20825?t=7&akid=533%2E3698%2ESv3Qpn) **
* * *
**✨ Back in stock ✨**
* * *
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/20827?t=8&akid=533%2E3698%2ESv3Qpn)
The heat is ending so now this Erica Smith for U.S. Senate hoodie is THE warm, cozy, Fall essential! Trust us on this! This is not your standard hoodie. Every piece from the Erica Smith online store is proudly union-made and every purchase directly supports our scrappy, grassroots campaign. Oh and it’s ULTRA soft and plush.
[**Click here to purchase your Erica Smith hoodie today »**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/20827?t=9&akid=533%2E3698%2ESv3Qpn)
* * *
Stay tuned for more soon,
Team Erica

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211009-533-footer&t=10&refcode2=533_3698_Sv3Qpn&akid=533%2E3698%2ESv3Qpn)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=11&akid=533%2E3698%2ESv3Qpn)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=533%2E3698%2ESv3Qpn)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

body:
read this -->

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37331196/310755538/-2023814932?refcode=20211009.4_TM_10AZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzhiMmRiOC0yYTI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=47-9HKS-P6n2e1GYY781aTRqQA6piQw2z9Bc36q8sI4=)

| | Let me lay it out for you, Derek: **this is the most important election in the country this year. Virginia is a must win for Democrats.**

For the last decade, Virginia Democrats have led the nation by delivering victory after victory for working families.

But now, our progress is under attack. If my opponent Glenn Youngkin becomes Virginia’s governor, he’ll roll back every inch we fought so hard for.

And right now, **Youngkin winning is a real possibility.** Polls show a razor thin margin, we’re being outraised, and initial reports show diminishing enthusiasm amongst Democrats.

We’ve got to start October off on the right foot because _we don’t have much time to make up ground._

That's why a group of donors stepped up to match every donation made today and tomorrow. If we don't start this month off right, and if we don't respond to this latest attack by a Koch backed group, we'll be on the back foot headed into November.

_**[So right now, will you make a matched donation of $30 to my campaign? Derek, Donald Trump wants to use this election as the launchpad for his 2024 campaign — and Glenn Youngkin has already said he supports four more years of Donald Trump.

clean_body: read this --> | | | = | | Let me lay it out for you, Derek: this is the most important election in the country this year. Virginia is a must win for Democrats. For the last decade, Virginia Democrats have led the nation by delivering victory after victory for working families. But now, our progress is under attack. If my opponent Glenn Youngkin becomes Virginia’s governor, he’ll roll back every inch we fought so hard for. And right now, Youngkin winning is a real possibility. Polls show a razor thin margin, we’re being outraised, and initial reports show diminishing enthusiasm amongst Democrats. We’ve got to start October off on the right foot because we don’t have much time to make up ground. That's why a group of donors stepped up to match every donation made today and tomorrow. Fellow American,

The Democrats in Washington have had a disastrous run as the majority party in Congress, and every American is being harmed as a result of their foolish decisions.

This weekend, I’m meeting with my team to finalize our strategy for the remainder of 2021, and to develop our plans to help take our country back in the midterm elections next year - [**and I would love to have your input.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=06d0cacf266c4999a980a997cc72b7c7&_e=fduU8ovvmWjNrtyJOVWx9ggOd9xiRPHTFfMTRVXpqo2hkfkzHYuBKsj0l5m6EZm4WIz51mOnmz3vhLhJmvOjbcSGFMqgEHTcuKu_MsMS5zdDwmsiMusd_z8NC48CKzVTBCBKOWobhZuc4KnWVNngZij4_AVm8LstBv4Lx7f5pQ1UPeizNe6ls1PsVLz5DcI8G8ZTVrxlOKGZlNjS7bG2VfVrvpoXJERLmGF7Ur1km-AoKjW48Plx6WhgTir_qBcLjVdm_Ie2Z9VEoj75kRZDcCgFB9UIf_4J32AiuwWw3poPO9RnU81OV1HcsXhI6VYLA4SodiLGrEgm7gstzgdStqBNeDT8VuzDHmGf6mvJ-o0QV2f6C5AMWVeJeyjAocoIHDmDyo1R67iYurDnv7803hCwJf1KluiT8-xFQhR6kZi1zpQ6tpBKDhCjbbSZY1z0gXhr-MYBenlSQcdsMa8y8L-h2702V35kscxUTuF_vI59h3Q8Svk0XvBrzlVYn_W6eXcT9SAOenYkr6FURDpjy3XnTfNxJZNyyGPxdA-k0lRgODiE3jdsUk5w3lym5vjrM0aygAujK8EKbaLEpHvM4o-zA7wSCqhHLoNvgc_TYlI%3D)

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Why giving now > giving in October 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
What if we told you that taking action now could double, triple, or quadruple your impact?
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211009-2946-header&t=1&akid=2946%2E434096%2Ev0VC_9)
Peter, I'm going to tell it to you straight: **A monthly donation to our campaign is the single greatest way to support our campaign ahead of 2022.**
I think that you deserve to know how you can make big stake in our campaign with an impact that will carry us for a long way. Because you’ve shown up early for John — and our campaign — and I know you’re in it with us to win this thing. 💪
**Here's the honest reason why:** By the time many voters will catch on to John Fetterman and begin donating to our campaign, we’ll be only _months_ away from the election. These donations will allow us to make critical last-minute investments in our organizers and ad buys, **but a recurring gift *started today* will allow us to build the foundational infrastructure that will truly make all the difference in this race.**
[**_So I’m here today to respectfully ask: Would you be able to set up a monthly, small-dollar donation of $5, $10, $25, or any amount to our campaign? Setting up a monthly contribution is easy and secure, and you can cancel any time if your budget changes._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32748?t=2&akid=2946%2E434096%2Ev0VC_9)
[**__**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32748?t=3&akid=2946%2E434096%2Ev0VC_9)
Watching your donations come in is the highlight of my day. But I can’t help but shout from the rooftops about why giving to a campaign early and often allows us to double, triple, and even quadruple your impact in the long run.
**Donating monthly is the *single best way* to support our campaign not just right now, but also for the long haul.** This is just the beginning of this journey, and this race will undoubtedly be the most competitive of 2022. [**_So please, can you set up a monthly, small-dollar donation of $5, $10, $25, or any amount to our campaign?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32748?t=4&akid=2946%2E434096%2Ev0VC_9)
**[Donate Monthly »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32748?t=5&akid=2946%2E434096%2Ev0VC_9)**
We can do so much more with your donation if we start now. It means the world!
With gratitude,
Eric Stern 💙
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211009-2946-footer&t=6&refcode2=2946_434096_v0VC_9&akid=2946%2E434096%2Ev0VC_9)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=7&akid=2946%2E434096%2Ev0VC_9)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=2946%2E434096%2Ev0VC_9)

clean_body: We're surprising Alek with a card from everyone on Team Skarlatos, including you Peter The only thing I’m guilty of is making my opponent and national Democrats spend money to defend a congressional seat they think belongs to them | It’s Alek’s birthday tomorrow! We want to surprise him with a card from everyone on Team Skarlatos, including you Peter! Right now, Alek is laser-focused on becoming one of the first Republican candidates for office this cycle to gain entry into the coveted “Young Guns” program through the RNC., which will give our campaign the needed support to flip this targeted Oregon seat RED! So, there’s no way he’s going to take a break to celebrate. so we can surprise him while he’s hard at work campaigning to win for the GOP. name: Charles Booker
subject: Welcome to the team, Peter 👋
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

It’s nice to meet you. My name is Charles Booker, and I’m running for the
U.S. Senate to represent Kentucky against Rand Paul.

I wanted to reach out to you myself to welcome you to our team. Thank you
for supporting my campaign, and our movement to bring change to Kentucky.

As a born-and-raised Kentuckian, running for this seat isn’t just politics
to me. It’s a very personal decision, and I want to share with you a bit
about my story and why I’m the best person to fight for you and your
family.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/3969?refcode=em20211009-1043&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1043%2E346206%2EoCDHud ]When you’re done reading my story, I hope you can take the next step
and make a donation to tell us you're committed to this fight too.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/3969?refcode=em20211009-1043&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1043%2E346206%2EoCDHud ]Contribute $5

My story is Kentucky’s story. It’s a story of perseverance, faith, and
overcoming impossible obstacles.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/3969?refcode=em20211009-1043&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1043%2E346206%2EoCDHud ]Charles and his mom, Earletta Hearn

I grew up in one of the poorest ZIP codes in Kentucky. We sometimes went
without heat in the winter or air conditioning in the summer. My mom often
went without eating so that I could. But I still went to school hungry and
tired. After I was diagnosed with diabetes, we were often forced to ration
my insulin just to survive.

Today, my wife and I are raising two young girls, and we have another baby
on the way. She can grow up in a world where only senators and their
wealthy friends can live a life of dignity — or she can grow up in a world
in which we can all thrive together, whether you’re from the hood or the
holler.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/3969?refcode=em20211009-1043&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1043%2E346206%2EoCDHud ]Picture of Charles and family

I know there are thousands of families in Kentucky just like mine who are
making painful sacrifices, working multiple jobs, and still can’t make
ends meet. The challenges we face are real, and they are urgent.

It’s never been clearer that we need bold solutions to our problems. It’s
time to demand real change; Kentuckians are hungry for it. I saw it in the
streets when I was marching with my neighbors to demand justice for
Breonna Taylor. I saw it last year when we ran a historic,
unapologetically progressive campaign against Mitch McConnell, and I hear
about it every day in our community.

We need transformative policies that guarantee health care to all, a
living wage to everyone, and that transforms our society to work for all
of us — not just the wealthy and well-connected.

But for years, Rand Paul has refused to deliver on this front. He’s used
his power in the Senate only to benefit the wealthy and the powerful,
while ignoring the rest of us.

Peter, above
all else, I love Kentucky. That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate. We
have so much strength, resolve, and potential — and we deserve so much
better than Rand’s failed leadership.

My mom taught me that if you have faith just the size of a mustard seed,
you can move a mountain. And I have faith that we can defeat Rand Paul and
take back Kentucky for us all. But if we’re going to do this, I can’t do
it alone.

So before you stop reading this email and go, I have to ask: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/3969?refcode=em20211009-1043&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=1043%2E346206%2EoCDHud ]Will you
make a donation to my campaign and help us take back Kentucky for the
people?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/3969?refcode=em20211009-1043&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=1043%2E346206%2EoCDHud ]Contribute $5

Thank you again for all of your support,

Charles

I wanted to reach out to you myself to welcome you to our team. Thank you for supporting my campaign, and our movement to bring change to Kentucky. As a born-and-raised Kentuckian, running for this seat isn’t just politics to me. It’s a very personal decision, and I want to share with you a bit about my story and why I’m the best person to fight for you and your family. [ ]When you’re done reading my story, I hope you can take the next step and make a donation to tell us you're committed to this fight too. [ ]Contribute $5 My story is Kentucky’s story. It’s a story of perseverance, faith, and overcoming impossible obstacles. [ ]Charles and his mom, Earletta Hearn I grew up in one of the poorest ZIP codes in Kentucky. We sometimes went without heat in the winter or air conditioning in the summer. My mom often went without eating so that I could. But I still went to school hungry and tired. After I was diagnosed with diabetes, we were often forced to ration my insulin just to survive. Today, my wife and I are raising two young girls, and we have another baby on the way. She can grow up in a world where only senators and their wealthy friends can live a life of dignity — or she can grow up in a world in which we can all thrive together, whether you’re from the hood or the holler. [ ]Picture of Charles and family I know there are thousands of families in Kentucky just like mine who are making painful sacrifices, working multiple jobs, and still can’t make ends meet. The challenges we face are real, and they are urgent. It’s never been clearer that we need bold solutions to our problems. It’s time to demand real change; Kentuckians are hungry for it. I saw it in the streets when I was marching with my neighbors to demand justice for Breonna Taylor. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Donald Trump is kicking off his comeback tour in our state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
I'm not going to sugarcoat things: Trump returning to our state is incredibly dangerous.
| | |
---
**It's happening, Peter: Donald Trump is back in Iowa for a rally, and Sen. Grassley will be sharing the stage with him. This is an urgent moment for our campaign and for our country, and I hope you'll allow me a minute to explain why.**
I served in Congress when Trump was president. I had an up-close seat as he obstructed justice and spouted his dangerous and increasingly anti-democratic ideologies. We've seen how much progress our country has made in less than a year since voters sent him and Republicans packing in the 2020 election. With Democratic majorities, our country has finally been able to move forward.
But today, Donald Trump landed in Iowa to kick off his comeback tour with my opponent Sen. Grassley (R-IA) right beside him – and we know exactly what Trump's game plan is. **Step one: protect vulnerable incumbents like his top ally Sen. Grassley (R-IA) and dismantle Democratic majorities. Step two: take back the White House.**
I'm not going to sugarcoat things: Trump returning to our state is incredibly dangerous. He will do everything he can to return Senate control to Republican hands. And he wants to protect his ally, Sen. Grassley – who recently defended Trump's attempts to use the Department of Justice to overturn the 2020 election results and now will be speaking alongside him at his far-right MAGA rally.
It's up to grassroots teams like ours to fight back and ensure that Trump and the Republicans don't regain control of the Senate. But we need grassroots resources to do it. **That's why we've set an emergency fundraising goal of $10,000 before midnight tonight. Please, can you donate now to counter Trump and Sen. Grassley's Iowa rally and protect our Democratic majority?**
**[Rush a donation of $5 or more – whatever you can spare as Trump and Sen. **It's happening, Derek: Donald Trump is back in Iowa for a rally, and Sen. Grassley will be sharing the stage with him. This is an urgent moment for our campaign, for Iowa and our country, and my friend Rep. Adam Schiff and I were hoping you'll allow me a minute to explain why.** I served alongside Adam in Congress when Trump was president. We had an up-close seat as he obstructed justice and spouted his dangerous and increasingly anti-democratic ideologies. We've seen how much progress our country has made in less than a year since voters sent him and Republicans packing in the 2020 election. With Democratic majorities, our country has finally been able to start moving forward. But today, Donald Trump landed in Iowa to kick off his comeback tour with my opponent Sen. Grassley (R-IA) right beside him – and we know exactly what Trump’s game plan is. **Step one: protect vulnerable incumbents like his top ally Sen. Grassley and dismantle Democratic majorities. Step two: take back the White House.** Adam isn’t one to sugarcoat things and neither am I: Trump returning to our state is incredibly dangerous. He will do everything he can to return Senate control to Republican hands. And he’s eager to protect his ally, Sen. It's up to grassroots teams like ours to fight back and ensure that Trump and the Republicans don't regain control of our majorities in Congress. name: Herschel Walker
subject: Real quick
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We're fighting to WIN BACK THE SENATE MAJORITY, but we need your help. Please WATCH this quick video I recorded. |
---

[**Peter, today I’m going to ask you to contribute $3 to my Democratic campaign to become the first woman of color elected to statewide office in Virginia — but first, let me explain how personal this race is to me.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37334386/310765268/-1547699132?amount=3&refcode=HAFV_20211009_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWI1MWI0Yi0zNzI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dApBRGTG3tBUYzZy1055QvzqNqvHoVNygGDNTePlbI8=) **I understand the issues because I’ve lived them.**

When I was 2 years old, I lost my birth father to gun violence. Growing up, my family struggled to make ends meet. And when I became a young mother, my job didn’t offer any health insurance. Thankfully, my son and I qualified for Medicaid, which ended up **saving his life.**

I'm a Virginia delegate, a cyber-security expert, a single mom — and this November, _I'll be Virginia’s first Afro-Latina woman and mom as Lieutenant Governor._

**I believe our Commonwealth thrives when everyone has a seat at the table, and I’m running for office to make that happen.**

I’m ready to get to work, but I can’t do it without you, Peter.

Donald Trump and Glenn Youngkin are playing a dangerous game, Derek.

For Trump, the game is simple. His path to being president again starts with undermining the legitimacy of the 2020 election. He’s attacking our democracy for his personal gain.

And Glenn Youngkin? He’s doing the same thing in Virginia. From refusing to shut down the idea that courts could still make Trump president to calling for voting machines to be audited, Youngkin has made Trump’s “big lie” the signature policy issue of his campaign.

We worked too hard to defeat Trumpism last year, Derek — we can’t let it make its way back into Virginia this year. **_[So right now, will you chip in any amount to Terry’s campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37334425/310765305/-2023814932?refcode=20211009.5_TEA_10BP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmI1MWI0Yi0zNzI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JkdhU2QZsbh0iBmrCuNIu1SjazfkznixOlyYNhgWFQA=)_**

clean_body: | | | | = | = Donald Trump and Glenn Youngkin are playing a dangerous game, Derek. For Trump, the game is simple. His path to being president again starts with undermining the legitimacy of the 2020 election. He’s attacking our democracy for his personal gain. And Glenn Youngkin? He’s doing the same thing in Virginia. From refusing to shut down the idea that courts could still make Trump president to calling for voting machines to be audited, Youngkin has made Trump’s “big lie” the signature policy issue of his campaign. We worked too hard to defeat Trumpism last year, Derek — we can’t let it make its way back into Virginia this year. = He needs to raise $400,000 by midnight tomorrow, and anything you chip in this weekend will be MATCHED, dollar for dollar: | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thanks for standing up to Trumpism and extremism in Virginia, Team Terry = Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Governor Sisolak has been a progressive champion for women’s rights, labor unions, environmental protections, and a public health insurance option. _And it’s pretty obvious that Republicans aren’t a fan of his work._
They spent millions of dollars trying to defeat him in 2018, and the attacks since he was elected have been relentless.
This grassroots team has fought hard for the progress we’ve made so far, which is why I’m reaching out personally about the importance of this latest poll.
**[We’re facing a tough battle here, and Steve needs your help to Keep Nevada Blue. clean_body: | | | | | ** Listen, folks. I’ll always be honest with this team. The first independent poll of the cycle was just released and it shows a razor thin lead for Governor Sisolak: As Steve’s Finance Director, I know this will only attract more investment from GOP mega-donors and right-wing super PACs who think this seat is flippable. So we’ve got to do everything we can to not only hold the line, but go into this re-election race stronger than ever before. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Governor Sisolak has been a progressive champion for women’s rights, labor unions, environmental protections, and a public health insurance option. And it’s pretty obvious that Republicans aren’t a fan of his work. They spent millions of dollars trying to defeat him in 2018, and the attacks since he was elected have been relentless. This grassroots team has fought hard for the progress we’ve made so far, which is why I’m reaching out personally about the importance of this latest poll. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for your support, Eva Black Sisolak for Governor | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor** P.O. body:

| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58497224:JeRBAv2NL:m:1:3253819041:55219682C5878617E90F43BFE871C109:r)
---
Peter,

In the aftermath of the bogus 2020 election, I said this:

**_" I'm worried about if the votes were counted right...We have a duty to fix this."_**

We have a duty to ALL Americans - past, present, and future - to protect our elections.

**That's why I've joined the National Republican Redistricting Committee - to stop the Democrats from rigging our election process.**

If we don't stop Democrats from gerrymandering our election districts, Republicans will never win another majority in Congress again. _It's that simple._

_Can I count on your help to stop the Democrats from gaming our elections?_

**[Please CONTRIBUTE NOW to join me and the NRRC in our fight to stop the Democrats from rigging our election process. > >](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58497224:JeRBAv2NL:m:1:3253819041:55219682C5878617E90F43BFE871C109:r)**

Democrats are trying to secure a PERMANENT MAJORITY in the House of Representatives by drawing election districts in their favor.

Imagine if the Democrats didn't even need to rig vote counts because the outcome of the election was already determined by the way the district was drawn.

The Democrats will gerrymander themselves into a permanent majority...

Unless we stop them. Will you join the fight against Democrat gerrymandering?

| [**STOP DEMOCRAT GERRYMANDERING > >**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58497224:JeRBAv2NL:m:1:3253819041:55219682C5878617E90F43BFE871C109:r)

If we don't stop the Democrats now, future generations will pay the price. Thank you for taking a stand.

Sincerely,

name: Jesse Sullivan
subject: WATCH: Crime is more than just statistics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois |
body:
Every day our city and our state refuse to take decisive action, more innocent bystanders are shot. More children die unnecessarily. [](http://links.donatetosully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=b5fd75d7cab94b0f8e4b3366b4421f20&_e=c3aYwQ-K4Y6YWMjmJAxIIUaC68E6mb-BBQXRMkYai397E0Rn0JxLyKZRRMYncLTUR-8CKYjZ1wfIXB-0ZT-V9g-eFyoggFYL_Wa3YF83SI5N-KAMpmqDthTGvrZ6M2lgepUQ3xpWbH3CXB_gMIeRaJ13z2tSc_jAdSVN4CkfmwiIyL9zc6qWLK44uK0k2elG803okkJ70MQV9_wHXhedJvxknluXc-qqIpRFoXy9K8G_Wj0VqCIRSOu-G0MFXdC2imzrGGjQX6g_iqJ-e770A2Sh5vTKcCQ05dSDD8iIk5YN8LuHGL9OegTkhfhXY3vf0FEeqK5CiIYPbnXJNv-8stHX_9Rp6uwx0p1z6-yF6rQD2WCflLwmu3ouhZtUwyjGWe7Fpt7c2TC4-hZBtNPaq6Q8qp72R-nVPMynHiXrHv2rbbqVpTLvuob4fr70kD6OeoNVZ7ZDbVRaaSJleP2_2wRclQtFK24KCQIhLF4ENqu2WRI1ZknZ9-wmUKVI4d3UAbE3Yd3BqchviO6QgkH3BRdhxl218VrwN6Bi-lAUV3wno8UC36C-UujmSLVFnbp4) | |
---
My friend,

**I never thought my home state that I love and the great city of Chicago would feel like a corrupt war zone, but here we are. **

Every day our city and our state refuse to take decisive action, more innocent bystanders are shot. More children die unnecessarily.

That’s why I held a press conference yesterday to talk about Mychal Moultry and Serenity Broughton, two young children who were shot and killed during the last few months of violence.

They are not statistics. And what happened to them demands action from our leaders.
[](http://links.donatetosully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=b5fd75d7cab94b0f8e4b3366b4421f20&_e=c3aYwQ-K4Y6YWMjmJAxIIUaC68E6mb-BBQXRMkYai397E0Rn0JxLyKZRRMYncLTUR-8CKYjZ1wfIXB-0ZT-V9g-eFyoggFYL_Wa3YF83SI5N-KAMpmqDthTGvrZ6M2lgepUQ3xpWbH3CXB_gMIeRaJ13z2tSc_jAdSVN4CkfmwiIyL9zc6qWLK44uK0k2elG803okkJ70MQV9_wHXhedJvxknluXc-qqIpRFoXy9K8G_Wj0VqCIRSOu-G0MFXdC2imzrGGjQX6g_iqJ-e770A2Sh5vTKcCQ05dSDD8iIk5YN8LuHGL9OegTkhfhXY3vf0FEeqK5CiIYPbnXJNv-8stHX_9Rp6uwx0p1z6-yF6rRzziUBjOopvfb82M7KMBu0l6bb6GGxtcPxgXpCGx0L1v8CC8fUXYPP-1IxCXGrI0IwhMNx4k7r8VPiUPzxl9Tg8sU3-od_HTuJm4W7goF7HAS-PLH6uW3D_yRcnndNk1BYO6xfaXHhpYIapB72_cVLocki70sOoNBiJo9aMeuGcxMLr5IaVYFnVbkjgpjb5vbwaRD1s-umM5yctFjyS9IB)
[**Watch Now**](http://links.donatetosully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=b5fd75d7cab94b0f8e4b3366b4421f20&_e=c3aYwQ-K4Y6YWMjmJAxIIUaC68E6mb-BBQXRMkYai397E0Rn0JxLyKZRRMYncLTUR-8CKYjZ1wfIXB-0ZT-V9g-eFyoggFYL_Wa3YF83SI5N-KAMpmqDthTGvrZ6M2lgepUQ3xpWbH3CXB_gMIeRaJ13z2tSc_jAdSVN4CkfmwiIyL9zc6qWLK44uK0k2elG803okkJ70MQV9_wHXhedJvxknluXc-qqIpRFoXy9K8G_Wj0VqCIRSOu-G0MFXdC2imzrGGjQX6g_iqJ-e770A2Sh5vTKcCQ05dSDD8iIk5YN8LuHGL9OegTkhfhXY3vf0FEeqK5CiIYPbnXJNv-8stHX_9Rp6uwx0p1z6-yF6rRZ2MHr0Bf1SOOt1wrRA1cBRmR2OKL_ZciANuUveFwvcepKXZMa8m0DZodxHC-AemQdlCFcxnBD_vil7guAwWnAS0WUwlQFaIvCGhWQWHc4Sw83aRN6M-UiLtCPT2PGZc5FFHIMGtOLVUJvFia_uSy5yuKNbPZTB3TkvFq6qjXL_ZIpn1gM5z0P_ZbfhoguCfMBK00eExPS_uB-TNh1JMcc)
**Governor Pritzker said Chicago is ‘nearly at a state of emergency.’ What is he waiting for?**

I call for justice for the family of four-year-old Mychal Moultry. I call for justice for the family of Serenity Broughton.

Elected officials need to change their tone and support our law enforcement. We need to bring back downtown, bring back security, and bring back accountability in our cities.

**I am ready to roll up my sleeves and make that happen, and I explained how in yesterday's press conference.**[**Watch the full video here**](http://links.donatetosully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=b5fd75d7cab94b0f8e4b3366b4421f20&_e=c3aYwQ-K4Y6YWMjmJAxIIUaC68E6mb-BBQXRMkYai397E0Rn0JxLyKZRRMYncLTUR-8CKYjZ1wfIXB-0ZT-V9g-eFyoggFYL_Wa3YF83SI5N-KAMpmqDthTGvrZ6M2lgepUQ3xpWbH3CXB_gMIeRaJ13z2tSc_jAdSVN4CkfmwiIyL9zc6qWLK44uK0k2elG803okkJ70MQV9_wHXhedJvxknluXc-qqIpRFoXy9K8G_Wj0VqCIRSOu-G0MFXdC2imzrGGjQX6g_iqJ-e770A2Sh5vTKcCQ05dSDD8iIk5YN8LuHGL9OegTkhfhXY3vf0FEeqK5CiIYPbnXJNv-8stHX_9Rp6uwx0p1z6-yF6rQCOdqLmdWJ4sm236y5Gkw9W1i4fNKzenA5nixFxnE8cq-4dbQv3AWO27RkkU-NVgCUkigkNylfdFbdyJ0WTnVPex_fcBszWV68sowNxKfjcBacVIRYAeizlVjFYwcR8sUbv0TQR5UzZODQU1ojZ8xS8Fhf6pBy-cgbN_0mdNecscii1GjbuZelSCzhmstfmAPgMjYOGvIK4pqbY-FD-VES).

Thank you,
Jesse Sullivan

name: SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)
subject: I lost two legs in Afghanistan. Please, I need your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin |
body:
11 years ago, I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan when a Taliban bomb blew up beneath me. Friend, 11 years ago, I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan when a Taliban bomb blew up beneath me. Our job was to go after high value Taliban targets in the dark of night in enemy territory. Many men and women I served with lost their lives to capture or kill radical Islamic terrorists. Now, Joe Biden has let these terrorists go free. It was just revealed that the ISIS-K suicide bomber that detonated the bomb at Kabul airport during the evacuation had been in U.S. custody for four years for planning another suicide bombing. Joe Biden let him walk free just days before he set off the blast. The Biden Administration is going to try to sweep this under the rug... _they’ve only ever been concerned with the optics and not the lives they are destroying!_ We can’t let that happen. **Please, from an Army grunt that wants nothing more than to defend our country, will you help me hold Joe Biden accountable for his incompetence and cruelty?** [**HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=0d2cf51c5e0e4154a92154d97916d454&_e=Sqlkctjra1RRru1Le_irG7IwKCGsWQUYvZ7Ug3tUPEWf1OSqLsygB9cNfDUmGRHlHEb0lsFOsKuBFV13LmYpn66c1OHIhOvHhTI0YEbHHb0SqKxNS3pL4fE12ayXGCZpzldPHozLQ83ZQavLGSSOKL1I8B837y_l6kBjmhE01fgh6lPYjL0UHFeP-xEichYYCHDRLJSTE_YRUTl0c7NGE0HlxVH2S68_5jnEZMPxreaSxx2rF3kC15iEdF2Tqcw0oeKIbzBLwQPVCiTuwnRck8Pv_PaSKNlgYIixD5mxNCedgGrXigMjIlrccD3kkq5gXbolo5KdFolKYwCy3a8wzRdwpCXJ7DjY-0xNjRrsO1j6_he2dGBBPv1XMn99y2HcGogL05DtRN7ne-Easa5r7TzcdjqZ3rX6MzMpSXXnSmVLB-7qU9sq60DuPFJ7HdIyq5e3mzmviwfPEOpm7Sd9J0wPIAwPImQHFU_EiMzioeKWD6qc8nqQBNbx1pJmhQlO) clean_body: 11 years ago, I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan when a Taliban bomb blew up beneath me. Friend, 11 years ago, I lost two legs and a finger serving our country in Afghanistan when a Taliban bomb blew up beneath me. Our job was to go after high value Taliban targets in the dark of night in enemy territory. Many men and women I served with lost their lives to capture or kill radical Islamic terrorists. Now, Joe Biden has let these terrorists go free. It was just revealed that the ISIS-K suicide bomber that detonated the bomb at Kabul airport during the evacuation had been in U.S. custody for four years for planning another suicide bombing. Joe Biden let him walk free just days before he set off the blast. The Biden Administration is going to try to sweep this under the rug... they’ve only ever been concerned with the optics and not the lives they are destroying! We can’t let that happen. Please, from an Army grunt that wants nothing more than to defend our country, will you help me hold Joe Biden accountable for his incompetence and cruelty? I am only alive today because when the bomb went off my fellow soldiers ran towards the explosion instead of away. They refused to leave me behind. Please, will you run toward the explosion with me to save the fate of our country? Thank you for your patriotism, SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.) | | | | Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin | | P.O. BOX 1027 - GREEN BAY, WI 54305 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Bernie said hold the line
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter — Bernie and
Justice Dems in Congress said hold. the. line. last week. And that’s just
what progressives did.

We stopped attempts by corporate Democrats, Big Pharma, Wall Street, and
Big Oil to pass a smaller bipartisan bill without passing the $3.5
trillion spending bill that contains economic relief, climate action, and
investments in education and housing.

But this is a long fight,
Peter. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/73800?refcode=em20211009-19910&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=19910%2E1203867%2EN5I8_n ]Can you chip in
$3 to fuel our advocacy and help us elect even more
progressives ready to hold the line for transformative change?

-Team JD

-----Forwarded Message-----

From: JusticeDemocrats.com
Date: September 29, 2021
Subject: Bernie says hold the line

Peter,

Conservative Democrats and corporate lobbyists are trying to BLOCK all
progressive policies. Joe Manchin, Kyrsten Sinema, Henry Cuellar, Wall
Street, Big Pharma, Big Tech, Big Oil...the list goes on — they all have
one thing in common: They don’t want Democrats to expand Medicare, address
climate change, increase corporate tax rates, and provide universal pre-K
and community college.

Justice Democrats and Bernie Sanders are holding the line. They won’t let
conservatives pass their Republican-backed infrastructure bill UNLESS the
$3.5 trillion spending bill is passed along with it. Alexandria
Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush, Rashida Tlaib, Bernie Sanders, and others are
using their power to win progressive priorities. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/73800?refcode=em20211009-19910&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=19910%2E1203867%2EN5I8_n ]If you’re down to hold
the line with us and want to elect more Justice Democrats to win
progressive policies, donate right now to fuel our fight.

Here’s Bernie not mincing words:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/73800?refcode=em20211009-19910&t=1004&akid=19910%2E1203867%2EN5I8_n ]Tweet from Senator Bernie Sanders yesterday at 3 p.m. that reads I
strongly urge my House colleagues to vote against the bipartisan
infrastructure bill until Congress passes a strong reconciliation bill.

What did Ilhan Omar have to say about progressive power? “We aren’t
bluffing.”

AOC? "Nothing would give me more pleasure than to tank a billionaire, dark
money, fossil fuel, Exxon lobbyist-drafted 'energy' infrastructure bill if
they come after our child care and climate priorities."

Justice Democrats are holding the line. But we can only support the Squad
and elect more Justice Democrats to Congress with your
help, Peter.
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/73800?refcode=em20211009-19910&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=19910%2E1203867%2EN5I8_n ]Rush your
first $3 donation to Justice Democrats
right now to back the Squad, hold the line, and expand progressive power
in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/73800?refcode=em20211009-19910&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=19910%2E1203867%2EN5I8_n ]Contribute

We can make real progress in this country, but only together.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1025&akid=19910%2E1203867%2EN5I8_n ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1026&akid=19910%2E1203867%2EN5I8_n ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211009-19910-footer&t=1027&refcode2=19910_1203867_N5I8_n&akid=19910%2E1203867%2EN5I8_n

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1028&akid=19910%2E1203867%2EN5I8_n

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Kat Cammack
subject: The Radical Left has no right forcing mandates!
body:
The Radical Left thinks they should have complete control over our personal medical decisions.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PlFmGxQ3GjztSXMYNxS41CMpbiuAQEsfI0irAeX4v2tqddB3CKKorrSTwVIGazU9QUV4AWx9ycl-5ni1Wb6fDw-R3ezI5vFkysS8azW9Kg9A75B4cYlpE4axoZh1VdWPLSfmMue9FxdMv4Q_2APoAeVH8R9g7u0rqZfkO1kx0ckWGUSi-6-LoBwANTp8q0byGPRyj9p1-PlzxGdmgG7pVA==&c=NHciUuk0cGdCu1Ryba74jCPyMvPI8iwgEqDI9SoENNOj_7dh9XfaCA==&ch=mZL_81fZ65RQ_CjAex_o7ZAY7SgBLTfjBcLxi7iSZ67iUx--8c3_1Q==)

| Friend,
The Radical Left thinks they should have complete control over our personal medical decisions. President Biden's recent push for vaccine mandates is a gross overreach by Washington bureaucrats into the lives of everyday Americans.
Biden needs to get his hands off of our medical decisions!
---

| It seems the obnoxious "My body, my choice" rhetoric only applies to the abortion of innocent children. The hypocrisy of these career politicians runs as deep as their long overdue terms.
Unconstitutional mandates are no surprise when we consider who we are dealing with. I made a promise when I was elected to Congress that I would fight against unconstitutional mandates. With your support, conservatives can take back the House in 2022 and keep America away from big government control.
[Can I count on your support to fight back against tyranny?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PlFmGxQ3GjztSXMYNxS41CMpbiuAQEsfI0irAeX4v2tqddB3CKKorrSTwVIGazU9QUV4AWx9ycl-5ni1Wb6fDw-R3ezI5vFkysS8azW9Kg9A75B4cYlpE4axoZh1VdWPLSfmMue9FxdMv4Q_2APoAeVH8R9g7u0rqZfkO1kx0ckWGUSi-6-LoBwANTp8q0byGPRyj9p1-PlzxGdmgG7pVA==&c=NHciUuk0cGdCu1Ryba74jCPyMvPI8iwgEqDI9SoENNOj_7dh9XfaCA==&ch=mZL_81fZ65RQ_CjAex_o7ZAY7SgBLTfjBcLxi7iSZ67iUx--8c3_1Q==)

name: Susie Lee
subject: The American Rescue Plan works, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
Our kids are back in school

|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37336467/310773978/-1528880522?refcode=SL_headerlogoAB&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDhhYzE1OS00MTI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FmiHmEpPQi4TX-iwsQUtUGu8YFqIA-n7fUzKQoU4wJI=)

| | Folks, Six months ago, Congress passed and President Biden signed the historic American Rescue Plan into law. We’re still seeing just how impactful this legislation has been as the Department of Education approved Nevada’s Elementary and Secondary School Emergency Relief (ESSER) plan, freeing up _**$358 million in pandemic relief funds to go directly to our schools.**_ This is monumental for students who have been affected by COVID-19 and families who have been worried about school preparedness. Having spent my career in education before coming to Congress, I know just how tough this pandemic has been on them. Rest assured, **our state has the funds to do everything it can to keep our kids safe and healthy while reopening our schools.** Many parents are already seeing the impact of school being back in session safely thanks to ESSER: unemployment is going down, financial stability is on the rebound, and bills can be paid with enough leftover for groceries. **I was proud to vote for the American Rescue Plan** and looking at how our students and parents are benefiting directly from its funding makes me even prouder. While there’s still plenty of work to be done to further support students during this ongoing transition, we can be proud of the progress we’ve made to get kids back in their classrooms. **_We’re on the road to healing from this pandemic_** and it’s thanks to the leadership of President Biden and my Democratic colleagues in Congress for getting us there. I’ll continue to do everything I can to support families in my district and across Nevada as we navigate our way through COVID-19. Thanks for reading, Susie
---

Together, we’ve abolished the death penalty, codified voting rights for all Virginians, installed protections for the LGBTQ community, raised the minimum wage, welcomed thousands of refugees and immigrants, ratified the ERA, taken down the Confederate statues in Richmond, and so much more.
I’m proud of all the progress we’ve been able to make as your Governor, but the reality of this situation is all of that could change on November 2nd.
If Republicans take control of the Executive Mansion and the House of Delegates, everything we’ve done could be rolled back. Glenn Youngkin has already promised to “go on offense” by limiting access to women’s reproductive health care if he wins in November, and we know he won’t stop there.
This is the year that we prove we are a Blue Commonwealth, but Virginia Democrats can’t do it without you. clean_body: no time to waste | | | Friends, Virginians are voting already — there’s no time to waste. As we enter the final stretch of this campaign, it’s crucial that Virginia Democrats have the resources they need to be able to elect Terry, Hala, and Mark and to make sure we hold onto our majority in the House of Delegates. That’s why I’m asking for your support today — The work the Democratic Party of Virginia is doing is critical to our Commonwealth’s progress.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = Together, we’ve abolished the death penalty, codified voting rights for all Virginians, installed protections for the LGBTQ community, raised the minimum wage, welcomed thousands of refugees and immigrants, ratified the ERA, taken down the Confederate statues in Richmond, and so much more. I’m proud of all the progress we’ve been able to make as your Governor, but the reality of this situation is all of that could change on November 2nd. If Republicans take control of the Executive Mansion and the House of Delegates, everything we’ve done could be rolled back. Glenn Youngkin has already promised to “go on offense” by limiting access to women’s reproductive health care if he wins in November, and we know he won’t stop there. This is the year that we prove we are a Blue Commonwealth, but Virginia Democrats can’t do it without you. = Thank you for everything, = Ralph Northam = = | | Click here to . | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. name: Parents Defending Education
subject: Sign the declaration: Students over teachers' unions
body:
Like many parents, one Rhode Island mom wanted to know what her daughter would be taught in school. But now she’s the targ
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z57hqv9jehjq4ph6choquujgf3s0dtmhsvies9v0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3i6coj4cjh2bs) Fellow American, Like many parents, one Rhode Island mom wanted to know what her daughter would be taught in school. But now she’s the target of a lawsuit from the National Education Association (NEA) — the largest teachers’ union in the country — just for asking questions. After enrolling her daughter in kindergarten, this mom asked the principal for more information about the curriculum. **She wanted to know what would be taught about Critical Race Theory (CRT) and gender identity.** The response? This Rhode Island mom says she was told to file public records (FOIA) requests to get the information she wanted. She filed FOIA requests ... **_and now a lawsuit from the NEA has followed._** **Teachers’ unions shouldn’t bully, intimidate, or silence concerned parents, community members, or groups like Parents Defending Education (PDE) that want to improve their kids’ education. ** **[If you agree, please click here to sign the declaration right now -- and join over 50,000 concerned parents and taxpayers who are standing up for a healthy, non-politicized education for our kids.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zqeirh72qirkfj062qn4p6d7ornp5oq0g7riavd8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3i6coj4cjh2bs)** [**Help Us Stand Against the NEA**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z1m90mh65uuduto80c554ainu0rm33pdimgfefno_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3i6coj4cjh2bs) Parents Defending Education is a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas. Through network and coalition building, investigative reporting, litigation, and engagement on local, state, and national policies, we are fighting for the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. **Right now, teachers’ unions are a major roadblock to making that vision a reality, and it’s time for parents to start wielding the enormous power we possess to reclaim our schools.** [**You can take the first step right now by signing this national declaration.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zmj9s14nij5d787bq4c2vtlheqa3h57049dft49g_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3i6coj4cjh2bs) You and I both know there are many thousands of outstanding teachers across the country who work hard every day to educate students and put them on a path to lifelong success. They’re the teachers who inspire your kids’ love of reading ... or spark an interest in science that leads them to a rewarding career ... or provide the mentorship and support that changes their lives. But too often this year, you and I have seen teachers’ unions put politics ahead of students and classroom learning — and lash out against parents and groups like Parents Defending Education (PDE) for our involvement in our kids’ educations. At PDE, we’ve experienced this firsthand. This summer, the NEA passed a resolution at its annual conference to allocate more than $50,000 to “research” groups like Parents Defending Education. And although they used the word “research,” they really mean “investigate and smear.” If they thought this “cancel culture” tactic would intimidate us — they were wrong. We’re more committed than ever to defending a healthy, non-political education for all students. **[If you stand with PDE, as I believe you do, please add your name to this declaration to stand with students, parents, and classroom teachers over the political interests of teachers’ unions.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zucrc35gh0dr8321r9rjftc19uspnacfe1j4run0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3i6coj4cjh2bs)** [**Help Us Stand Against the NEA**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zonee3p2uheslv42hoianplmceuqushl10vgt070_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3i6coj4cjh2bs) Thank you for your support. Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z95p5a8ecbk87kog49t05asg9c5ke55aub416cgo_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3i6coj4cjh2bs) | [](twitterhttps://twitter.com/defendinged?lang=en) | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zb7bl0o1b829m9ni0qdmcqd4n9u7td8rm0tqtfvo_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3i6coj4cjh2bs) | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zlllfrqq8hk79711ctlc2urgi131rd6s7fr9vgsg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3i6coj4cjh2bs) | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zgi9p61b577of22opjf9sgs7c6l3m3102f3fvd7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c3i6coj4cjh2bs)

name: Team Schmidt
subject: Don’t take OUR word for it!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
Once again, we’ve had another outstanding week for our campaign. Even more Kansas leaders have decided to join our team and endorse Derek Schmidt for Friend, **Once again, we’ve had another outstanding week for our campaign.** Even more Kansas leaders have decided to join our team and endorse Derek Schmidt for Governor! [**If you want to join Team Schmidt too, consider chipping in right now to help support our campaign.**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=94ebadd42bf944cf97e2fb1489d22aab&_e=nUQlh3yocy_5scZuWKSoRi_3WtVDXR-tRJ8qbtN36FtIXcyQRuC59G9WNKIMUV-1n-0Igf8nqatcg8l6v1j_GLeu-mXgOuhAIug1g19_q03we3Afq0FCtEYdqusbqOsjRH2b_IgKsTY5P-KUIg0FQB4AwcneY9I61tKgsT-lM3iNJI5txulbY-1nCLSs6YSmiDsQqvowIbpNZb7TpNAoP3-Emn_RYBN7OYFPDYPLffECJqPRgj_RRw1gXm6Tl21exTFvZaTHz-Y05qIX3WVywUMyX-hEgsB_OENoAke0QnmSPmlGayIjRFHD2XYoxN_QglkPLNr6ydfc9g7PqMkKVrVXdHb0ll-TtDW7chUgBTMqU5LXZenLl4AeCW1gnKQYXT7iay7hdqFPVGBdSSYNVEKSofsvri8DXF2lNoU5kUCW7zSps6BdYPE_FuNsPlXL27MT88_uckkUeuPvXi9GC0qhKuNflmwtrIOAGCk9KFexnQfhGfhrKpJVgL7WU16Q) Check out some of what some of these Kansas Senators and Representatives from all over the state had to say about Derek this week: _“Two of the top priorities I’ve advocated for in the Senate are the Fairness in Women’s Sports Act and the Value Them Both constitutional amendment - issues that are so important to women across Kansas, myself included. Derek Schmidt has been a champion for these causes and has done an excellent job fighting for Kansas values and our freedoms as Attorney General.”_ **_–_****Renee Erickson, Kansas State Senator ** _"I'm excited to endorse Derek Schmidt to be the next Governor of Kansas. There have been times I've had to fight tough battles over the years, and Derek has always been a trusted voice who I have been able to rely on for good advice.” _ **– Susan Estes, Kansas State Representative** _“I’ve known Derek Schmidt for a long time, even before I came to the Legislature. We’ve become great friends and I’ve really enjoyed watching him lead with competency and integrity as our attorney general. I look forward to watching him do the same as our next Kansas governor.”_ **–****Susan Concannon****,****Kansas State Representative** _“Derek Schmidt is the right person for Kansas in this moment. The thing I appreciate the most about Derek as both a citizen and a legislator is how he is not afraid to stand up and go head to head with the governor or the president because he knows he’s doing what’s right for Kansans.” _ **–****Suzi Carlson****,****Kansas State Representative** _“Throughout my time in the Legislature, and particularly on the Judiciary Committee, I’ve observed Attorney General Schmidt testifying and have always been impressed by his grasp of Kansas law, our constitution, and his focus on the well-being of Kansans.”_ **–****Susan Humphries,****Kansas State Representative** _“Derek Schmidt is an outstanding attorney general who always fights for Kansans. He stands strong against federal overreach like the Biden vaccine mandates, he has fought hard against the governor’s mandates and lockdowns here at home, and he has been the last line of defense for our individual liberty. He is the right person to take the governor’s office back next November and get Kansas on the right track.”_ **–****Cheryl Helmer****,****Kansas State Representative** _“Pro-Life and Pro-Agriculture: two principles I share with Attorney General and gubernatorial candidate, Derek Schmidt. Just as a respect for life underscores all healthy social policy, so does agriculture underscore the Kansas economy. Derek Schmidt embodies commitment to these principal mainstays of life in our great state. Please join me in supporting Derek Schmidt as the next Governor of Kansas.”_ **–****Lisa Moser****,****Kansas State Representative** It’s clear that leaders from all across the state are jumping at the chance to support Derek Schmidt to be our next Governor. clean_body: Once again, we’ve had another outstanding week for our campaign. Even more Kansas leaders have decided to join our team and endorse Derek Schmidt for Friend, Once again, we’ve had another outstanding week for our campaign. Even more Kansas leaders have decided to join our team and endorse Derek Schmidt for Governor! Check out some of what some of these Kansas Senators and Representatives from all over the state had to say about Derek this week: “Two of the top priorities I’ve advocated for in the Senate are the Fairness in Women’s Sports Act and the Value Them Both constitutional amendment - issues that are so important to women across Kansas, myself included. Derek Schmidt has been a champion for these causes and has done an excellent job fighting for Kansas values and our freedoms as Attorney General.” –Renee Erickson, Kansas State Senator "I'm excited to endorse Derek Schmidt to be the next Governor of Kansas. There have been times I've had to fight tough battles over the years, and Derek has always been a trusted voice who I have been able to rely on for good advice.” – Susan Estes, Kansas State Representative “I’ve known Derek Schmidt for a long time, even before I came to the Legislature. We’ve become great friends and I’ve really enjoyed watching him lead with competency and integrity as our attorney general. I look forward to watching him do the same as our next Kansas governor.” –Susan Concannon,Kansas State Representative “Derek Schmidt is the right person for Kansas in this moment. The thing I appreciate the most about Derek as both a citizen and a legislator is how he is not afraid to stand up and go head to head with the governor or the president because he knows he’s doing what’s right for Kansans.” –Suzi Carlson,Kansas State Representative “Throughout my time in the Legislature, and particularly on the Judiciary Committee, I’ve observed Attorney General Schmidt testifying and have always been impressed by his grasp of Kansas law, our constitution, and his focus on the well-being of Kansans.” –Susan Humphries,Kansas State Representative “Derek Schmidt is an outstanding attorney general who always fights for Kansans. He stands strong against federal overreach like the Biden vaccine mandates, he has fought hard against the governor’s mandates and lockdowns here at home, and he has been the last line of defense for our individual liberty. He is the right person to take the governor’s office back next November and get Kansas on the right track.” –Cheryl Helmer,Kansas State Representative “Pro-Life and Pro-Agriculture: two principles I share with Attorney General and gubernatorial candidate, Derek Schmidt. Just as a respect for life underscores all healthy social policy, so does agriculture underscore the Kansas economy. Derek Schmidt embodies commitment to these principal mainstays of life in our great state. Please join me in supporting Derek Schmidt as the next Governor of Kansas.” –Lisa Moser,Kansas State Representative It’s clear that leaders from all across the state are jumping at the chance to support Derek Schmidt to be our next Governor. Now, we need every single Kansas Patriot to join us in our fight against the Far-Left to help get things back on track here in Kansas. Thanks, Team Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

Derek, I wish I was reaching out with good news, but a brand-new poll shows me losing by 2 points to my Trump-endorsed opponent and CNN is calling me one of the most vulnerable senators in the nation.

GOP outside groups have _already_ spent over $1 million to flip this seat – and _The Cook Political Report_ just _downgraded_ my chances of winning Nevada's critical Senate race.

Let me be very clear: Senate control hinges on what happens in Nevada – and I'm about to fall short of my urgent rapid-response goal.

That's why I'm turning to you, friend: I won by just 2 points in 2016, and I cannot afford to miss this goal or lose any ground. Races in Nevada are always tough, so I'm counting on you.

I wouldn't ask you personally like this if it weren't important. I need to raise another $7,012 by midnight – and I can't miss this goal. **With Senate control on the line, every single dollar today could mean the difference between winning and losing.**

[**Please, Derek, will you rush a $25 donation now to defend our Democratic Senate majority? name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Newsom Mandates CRT in High Schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [The Last Straw](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziorfiLe8YHAfgtYhG-eaYXfYBPOMZnQHBGp2DLuNs2iczA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_9_final&n=1) Remember the ban on plastic straws? Gavin Newsom just extended it to forks, chopsticks, ketchup, and other “foodware accessories.” I only wish I could tell you that was the worst bill he signed this week. Yesterday, Newsom signed the CRT bill. This isn't a bill allowing CRT to be taught in our schools. It’s a bill _requiring_ it to be taught in our schools. Two years after saying the ethnic studies curriculum would “never see the light of day,” Newsom has made it a high school graduation requirement. The National Review called the curriculum “the most radical, polemical, and ideologically loaded educational document ever offered up for public consideration in the free world.” You can see my speech against it on the Assembly Floor [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioqeF4S63jWs3cr12IHKL9uZI6vMws0FqsV0J0J6odgkYw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_9_final&n=2). Meanwhile, at some schools kids are being treated worse than prisoners. I’ve heard reports in LA of students being allowed to drink water just when they're at lunch. To make matters worse, a leading parent group fighting this insanity, [Reopen California Schools](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sAbiimTwRd6ssr23ZzK-qI6InpOY_O-vubsgKvr3srL&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_9_final&n=3), was just shut down by Facebook for days. Only after we got the national media's attention did Facebook (a major Newsom donor) bring the group back. This all comes only days after Newsom’s outrageous K-12 vaccine mandate. Lawmakers are already suggesting they’ll try to remove any personal belief or religious exemption from the mandate when we return in January. Get ready to fight. [Help me fight back at the State Capitol](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv_IPFMzzv9WmdPghwMBSwX0KOu7WTw5uuSoUQzsIZxhqw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_9_final&n=4) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAxknWCBSRf7vLNLsCe6xYt7B5v6H7IBwn_ecbFGhaX4MQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_9_final&n=5) Kevin Kiley
[](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_9_final&n=6)California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=oct_9_final&n=7).

name: Blake Masters
subject: The Attorney General thinks you're the bad guy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate**
body:
Did you see what the DOJ said about conservative parents? | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0141c5d989324adcae5d5957ddc76b7b&_e=VoVlR3QBPku7QjQNPymFdlB5mJxPcJkFpSwszfwGgH2_ur0KCmfXnyxnc0JlLdcLHca2cDUKa-iHJ1dTW-hmASv7mEjqIDxIocgtYoyGSYhkglEl9jI5WABc0kd4ydpCls-QHquCCgbMRznMzfELocKaiHY_YjcMaMKCsVJBc7eomTIcm2AVcmATfr6kfwHZb_o_88xQ9pWh48IMOr04GBzkVxckSo04O9iENtid7QesbOAtF-eXBNlOdeH2b1PMo2EhyjdAbq6NWmSp50sCacLwGFbZ-dyQxDvixj6UZ2CG5vHTuex8bZ3p4cU-OIa9ls_DD9ystxI3gF8pgYfh3-DFdM2qTPmGgtTqtQpU-Hn9hNwb4CAhJaR8CMafVfbnhvZqaCAcytScGYdQij8ORWsD9m3WgBhVwNmmRXz9YBrm3ap8H8Wxq2EmJWGeymeEBuapZmrBJOaoit1rCof7Tg%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

In response to the National School Board Association essentially calling conservative parents _“domestic terrorists,”_ **Attorney General Merrick Garland instructed the FBI to mobilize against parents that opposed critical race theory in schools.**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0141c5d989324adcae5d5957ddc76b7b&_e=VoVlR3QBPku7QjQNPymFdlB5mJxPcJkFpSwszfwGgH2_ur0KCmfXnyxnc0JlLdcLGm0xcBC8XzER_RisFd0PnmerEAuDGfrd6OXkubjtV--DbYk_wquiqmyiOhGqCTtY9D1FS-rD7qFBXtXkPWUsD4PEz-xtKnsedYVfIoOfpEOcv1y9TPlsAgpWZRI-Ll0GaQolq3Pi2Md0gBGGUYitwAurcPmrJWgKLZomEu546DAfRbeZSjWc0qJRvW1IqNxA75daqB4UGAxPe_FQ2_Y0iNsW7KK5E-SZj14ZkmLqgT0cVbQitKCw5jD6qv7k0KTo35JspO0etmdLlAXzeHeaAUMJMgfTThp3U4oZ9Z6KBaH1BuJ4A54tTDWvnMzknTWPLKYHclGU7fu_P9zi1YcZ0LvXN3E8kY9jw_uQJc95cjyGElfznWwnZmMuqQHIATX53vbIBKGDfFcoHsZtf7Uikg%3D%3D)

**The Biden Administration is weaponizing the Department of Justice against American parents.**

They have made parents out to be the bad guy because they dared to stand up for their children and push back on these failing school boards.

According to the Department of Justice, you're the bad guy for standing up for your children.

You're the bad guy while schools teach your children hate and racism.

You're the bad guy because you want classroom time spent on math and writing, not critical race theory.

[**We need to do whatever we can to block the Left's agenda and keep them from reclassifying dissent as _"disinformation"_ and _"domestic terrorism."_**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0141c5d989324adcae5d5957ddc76b7b&_e=VoVlR3QBPku7QjQNPymFdlB5mJxPcJkFpSwszfwGgH2_ur0KCmfXnyxnc0JlLdcLGm0xcBC8XzER_RisFd0PnmerEAuDGfrd6OXkubjtV--DbYk_wquiqmyiOhGqCTtY9D1FS-rD7qFBXtXkPWUsD4PEz-xtKnsedYVfIoOfpEOcv1y9TPlsAgpWZRI-Ll0GaQolq3Pi2Md0gBGGUYitwAurcPmrJWgKLZomEu546DAfRbeZSjWc0qJRvW1IqNxAz1i_RyhtvRkv9Kfa1CfNyN77muT-38PPtXgfL98_Gs8AYC9VEFAtFP6uEM1iYe_5f37Q_6Fk1yVb_91M0zpt83ujJb8E4_p6yMp4cS5JyVkTSsFKdfTna_2MeLyOZ-o4b0a5BAtTM-LaAyO1abmKPzDD_37BQKZ8PyRthwP626qofXjSOS6EmTOpo0L0rSU99ewhQeob3E9iDKFRfpnvBw%3D%3D)

Your government is being weaponized against you, and we need to take back the U.S. Senate to stop their progress. **I'm running to flip a Senate seat in Arizona, and we can't take back the Senate if we don't take back Arizona.**

[**Peter, will you contribute $5 today to help me block the Biden Administrations' weaponization of the U.S. government?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0141c5d989324adcae5d5957ddc76b7b&_e=VoVlR3QBPku7QjQNPymFdlB5mJxPcJkFpSwszfwGgH2_ur0KCmfXnyxnc0JlLdcLGm0xcBC8XzER_RisFd0PnmerEAuDGfrd6OXkubjtV--DbYk_wquiqmyiOhGqCTtY9D1FS-rD7qFBXtXkPWUsD4PEz-xtKnsedYVfIoOfpEOcv1y9TPlsAgpWZRI-Ll0GaQolq3Pi2Md0gBGGUYitwAurcPmrJWgKLZomEu546DAfRbeZSjWc0qJRvW1IqNxAMWNB05yYOxR504qVRjsQYqWxCemaFKTokd0eF08MKaCIpJ94h8x-a-ftnMq3DiOBh5I6Bvz33eWQ6Wnwr4qSbepQh7shgkIIpVOP4UgdpoR1ssdiijTZxwvKDLyzaYj5gJ-Pv4CU2KeOgG16zhc385w91PJv7pqvHzK0RxG8yDxJmP9yxOCubkeoxoBBMm756pOGR9B0iHwWKV6AHd0l1Q%3D%3D)

[** ****DONATE TODAY ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0141c5d989324adcae5d5957ddc76b7b&_e=VoVlR3QBPku7QjQNPymFdlB5mJxPcJkFpSwszfwGgH2_ur0KCmfXnyxnc0JlLdcLHca2cDUKa-iHJ1dTW-hmASv7mEjqIDxIocgtYoyGSYhkglEl9jI5WABc0kd4ydpCls-QHquCCgbMRznMzfELocKaiHY_YjcMaMKCsVJBc7eomTIcm2AVcmATfr6kfwHZb_o_88xQ9pWh48IMOr04GBzkVxckSo04O9iENtid7QesbOAtF-eXBNlOdeH2b1PMDnlGILXMPiTifOoEoIt6aWE_uSy1Ex7U-CjCOSidVTuO9jdJO4CSb1WnLJcS4Od6ONSgY_n0u108jeRAKKBcHQz93kDIO7MD1cXEIV0-h1tdp8cwo5hV0wtEh7ZzO98WiCMX-QLXjNjJ3Q_-eyw79C-rEOS0t1sa7Aql_eX4AKydwWc1y4qzx9iJ5eFJ4jvw_wCMzuJycrP8LpPPJPpNoQ%3D%3D)
Thank you,

Blake Masters

clean_body: Did you see what the DOJ said about conservative parents? | Peter, In response to the National School Board Association essentially calling conservative parents “domestic terrorists,” Attorney General Merrick Garland instructed the FBI to mobilize against parents that opposed critical race theory in schools. The Biden Administration is weaponizing the Department of Justice against American parents. They have made parents out to be the bad guy because they dared to stand up for their children and push back on these failing school boards. According to the Department of Justice, you're the bad guy for standing up for your children. You're the bad guy while schools teach your children hate and racism. You're the bad guy because you want classroom time spent on math and writing, not critical race theory. Your government is being weaponized against you, and we need to take back the U.S. Senate to stop their progress. I'm running to flip a Senate seat in Arizona, and we can't take back the Senate if we don't take back Arizona. Thank you, Blake Masters Republican for U.S. Senate, Arizona P.S. I'm running against one of the Democrat's top fundraisers. In 2020, he raised close to $100 million. | | Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Terry McAuliffe has to win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37339856/310782747/-2023814932?refcode=20211009.6_EAW_10BR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzA2YTk3MC01MDI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ggttdn5buDI1IF3vQkLBg18pFxeZuaUM6NkjxoiALno=)

| | Derek,

The Virginia Governor’s race is coming down to the wire, with _The Cook Political Report_ now calling it a toss-up — and the stakes could not be higher.

On the one hand, Democrat Terry McAuliffe has put forward plan after plan to help Virginia families — from protecting voting rights to increasing teacher pay.

And his Trump-endorsed opponent? _The Washington Post_ said Glenn Youngkin is “undermining democracy” by “playing footsie” with Donald Trump’s so-called ‘big lie.’

These are difficult times for so many in Virginia and our country. We need to elect leaders who will stand up for working families and our democracy.

Derek, that’s Terry McAuliffe, and he needs our help.

**[Please donate if you can to Terry’s campaign today. Early voting is already underway in Virginia, and Terry needs our help so he can get out the vote in the final weeks of the campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37339857/310782748/-2023814932?refcode=20211009.6_EAW_10BR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzA2YTk3MC01MDI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ggttdn5buDI1IF3vQkLBg18pFxeZuaUM6NkjxoiALno=)**

Your support is especially important because Terry’s opponent is trying to use his vast personal wealth to buy the race.

In fact, Glenn Youngkin outraised Terry at a recent filing deadline only because he wrote his campaign huge checks totaling more than $4 million.

Derek, the Virginia governor’s office shouldn’t be sold off to the highest bidder. Our democracy is not for sale.

Terry can stop him, but he’ll need our help to match Youngkin’s bucket loads of cash.

**[So I am asking. The average small-dollar donation to Terry’s campaign is just under $30. Can you chip in that amount or any amount meaningful to you right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37339858/310782749/-2023814932?refcode=20211009.6_EAW_10BR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzA2YTk3MC01MDI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ggttdn5buDI1IF3vQkLBg18pFxeZuaUM6NkjxoiALno=)**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37339859/310782750/-2023814932?refcode=20211009.6_EAW_10BR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzA2YTk3MC01MDI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ggttdn5buDI1IF3vQkLBg18pFxeZuaUM6NkjxoiALno=)**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump rally in Iowa today
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
He attacked me personally two weeks ago at his rally in Georgia and I wouldn’t be surprised if he does it again today. |
#
Derek, Donald Trump is on his way to Iowa for his next rally **right now.** All signs are pointing toward a third Trump presidential campaign in 2024, and his Iowa rally is the clearest one yet. In just a moment, I’ll ask you to pitch in to my campaign — **[but if you’re ready before Trump gets on stage to kickstart our effort to defeat his next campaign, you can make your contribution right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37339836/310782732/-827659615?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211009_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjA2YTk3MC01MDI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kDY7CzXcIrY0CMQYOeE6Sbf7aCmHPLLeVbnY4hYyLvQ=)** Just a few weeks ago in Georgia, Trump rallied supporters for his hand-picked GOP Senate candidate to take on Sen. Raphael Warnock and fired a warning shot at Democrats for standing up for truth, fighting for justice, and refusing to back down from his all-out assault on our rule of law and democracy. I wish we were done with Donald Trump for good. But as long as he continues to attack the democratic ideals that our country stands for, I won’t back down. You can’t either. I’ve told you many times before that the struggle we are presently engaged in for our democracy won’t be easy. And it won’t be quick. But it’s vitally necessary if we are going to defeat Trump and everything he stands for and protect our democracy for generations to come. That’s why I need your support: **Can you rush a donation to our campaign before Trump gets on stage for the first Iowa rally of his next presidential campaign? clean_body: He attacked me personally two weeks ago at his rally in Georgia and I wouldn’t be surprised if he does it again today. | Derek, Donald Trump is on his way to Iowa for his next rally right now. All signs are pointing toward a third Trump presidential campaign in 2024, and his Iowa rally is the clearest one yet. In just a moment, I’ll ask you to pitch in to my campaign — = Just a few weeks ago in Georgia, Trump rallied supporters for his hand-picked GOP Senate candidate to take on Sen. Raphael Warnock and fired a warning shot at Democrats for standing up for truth, fighting for justice, and refusing to back down from his all-out assault on our rule of law and democracy. I wish we were done with Donald Trump for good. But as long as he continues to attack the democratic ideals that our country stands for, I won’t back down. You can’t either. I’ve told you many times before that the struggle we are presently engaged in for our democracy won’t be easy. And it won’t be quick. But it’s vitally necessary if we are going to defeat Trump and everything he stands for and protect our democracy for generations to come. That’s why I need your support: Can you rush a donation to our campaign before Trump gets on stage for the first Iowa rally of his next presidential campaign? We can’t back down from this challenge when his Big Lie and anti-democratic appeals threaten the foundation of our democracy. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for pitching in and standing with me. You have no idea how much it means to me. — Adam Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress Schiff for Congress 150 E. Olive Ave. Suite 208 Burbank, CA 91502 United States
