| [](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=894b5b1cbf0249a7af1ddffe9747e54f&_e=gsMYv_TwE7WkDQ-LTWGxsaAYnKrJsLmOSAluds_9Oh7hyENQ9Lcqdv5gTgPM0jLncuUP2P0UJXqekGnENalhnjbR94H4Cmay_HBkyUtmvNPnt03al3DRjIhlqQLb2fnguZBsbmXNg1S26Pj0bzxpPLmzU-Em6Nnt19QYMoOuEMXNoPDZVAl5KJ1GEHgjO0vkw70S_uhNoyTRReKDHlz3jJjfW1q3imcEGBv66otMEWmTsFf_-pOHCZ66NcKDIk9DKQUI5yYpXn6MPk6RS9PHXTok_Mdb16M2DamOrT6LvT7SAxt2tCV7PEuk8ZRSSZzVD-SLz5_qcRwBKC-bZH3k8_mgy1qxOAxDh7TyHT88CrcEASCe2Rl6lIz50ZJztW51w4Qn_kgFzJHcHH2VoZuCtD8yetoZuAygqTLaA6ziHe1bWSHkFu3QUqlr__wV1q7tGOTXoG6qugMBaG4Teru3ZkOG9lwLW2VYwX-ZLYzjlOnmTbW7ubkk0iR61wksrUO_) TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA
* * *
---
Fellow Conservative,

The Left will not be happy until they have sucked the joy out of every last part of our lives. And now, Dr. Fauci is on television trying to cancel Christmas family gatherings and impose never‐ending lockdowns.

When asked whether or not families could gather for Christmas, Fauci said it was "too soon" to consider gatherings of any kind because of COVID. **If we don't stop these power‐hungry Radicals, we will be locked down forever.** [](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=894b5b1cbf0249a7af1ddffe9747e54f&_e=gsMYv_TwE7WkDQ-LTWGxsaAYnKrJsLmOSAluds_9Oh7hyENQ9Lcqdv5gTgPM0jLncuUP2P0UJXqekGnENalhnjbR94H4Cmay_HBkyUtmvNPnt03al3DRjIhlqQLb2fnguZBsbmXNg1S26Pj0bzxpPLmzU-Em6Nnt19QYMoOuEMXNoPDZVAl5KJ1GEHgjO0vkw70S_uhNoyTRReKDHlz3jJjfW1q3imcEGBv66otMEWmTsFf_-pOHCZ66NcKDIk9DKQUI5yYpXn6MPk6RS9PHXTok_Mdb16M2DamOrT6LvT7zonaN9dCB2dtG1Csas3ezTJC9rBq_WAP6Arscqjj05l1fwPhYwI2uGoRaJfJggr0G3oHWduQYMZerssmeRCnGggGYQiT1Gf3_y1mRzfU1rB3OjpBa5-AbmiXox3afipQ8p9gn6SGqqZQk8aZ9Mtqy3z4RInqa7exQsNDnbSFi5yWLVzyno1G51m2l0Uu8Qx3sOc9NpVKpj5-ArCZXNxQL) | [**STOP THE LEFT FROM CANCELING CHRISTMAS**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=894b5b1cbf0249a7af1ddffe9747e54f&_e=gsMYv_TwE7WkDQ-LTWGxsaAYnKrJsLmOSAluds_9Oh7hyENQ9Lcqdv5gTgPM0jLncuUP2P0UJXqekGnENalhnjbR94H4Cmay_HBkyUtmvNPnt03al3DRjIhlqQLb2fnguZBsbmXNg1S26Pj0bzxpPLmzU-Em6Nnt19QYMoOuEMXNoPDZVAl5KJ1GEHgjO0vkw70S_uhNoyTRReKDHlz3jJjfW1q3imcEGBv66otMEWmTsFf_-pOHCZ66NcKDIk9DKQUI5yYpXn6MPk6RS9PHXTok_Mdb16M2DamOrT6LvT62jdiA9EHN6xKIhkm0kpE7pjJnMz9uTymP2Rl79eX6y__3_EILVL03FO0TfyP3sZAu90L5LemS7kcoCUyUa61JaCnBUM7tSEgkpgHbskdhily-5WUowNTnvv41HJTAEc3MYeyZ-DpSI7Y89V4iVWi4sPfI_IIil_jxIvQUBj5yQ-P_XvMYEyYSevxeq54j_-pFP4zShw7s_okgf58c2ino)
---

At the root of it all, this is an endless power grab. Liberals are eager for Big Government to control every aspect of our lives, and they will never trust you to make responsible decisions for yourself. **I think it's sickening, and our government has no business telling you who to see on Christmas.**

[**Join my fight today to save Christmas and protect your personal freedoms. Do not let them get away with this! >>**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=894b5b1cbf0249a7af1ddffe9747e54f&_e=gsMYv_TwE7WkDQ-LTWGxsaAYnKrJsLmOSAluds_9Oh7hyENQ9Lcqdv5gTgPM0jLncuUP2P0UJXqekGnENalhnjbR94H4Cmay_HBkyUtmvNPnt03al3DRjIhlqQLb2fnguZBsbmXNg1S26Pj0bzxpPLmzU-Em6Nnt19QYMoOuEMXNoPDZVAl5KJ1GEHgjO0vkw70S_uhNoyTRReKDHlz3jJjfW1q3imcEGBv66otMEWmTsFf_-pOHCZ66NcKDIk9DKQUI5yYpXn6MPk6RS9PHXTok_Mdb16M2DamOrT6LvT5S0DGpUTY3EXNTyM8KYLcFROWAY-XBYatNV5P750CiLkakN0Yivvegnb4sa5_6KE1XfscmKw6Vs9QJLmuCmmfUV0PK9aI-r4AXpThtXMX4SEfZJdxq1puNQNiEAPR2pnlx7ztUKvp8IPE4N6_0DEEmuj_c9j_ojt-MLi_8y3IlXzW1Uj4ehMs-Qm51WyVvZBPEdC0-b_gSPk0mR7GFirSX)

Sincerely,

Ted Budd

Friend,

Election Day is less than one month away, and that means it's time for our campaign and our supporters to go ALL OUT and finish this thing.

**That’s why we released a new ad. Have you seen it yet?**
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=2a2e4da9b71f4984955cc792f5f1e880&_e=w8ubGvXUVuLPbZ2QWSEK89k87aeNgHd61ZpiPx0D7_Blmq5C8zZjQGGQDVfUJXIRnW5BFg5C3YmOY1QcQad1qyIqkuwGLaOv9i4o1UiGdNemEH8Xsb6cDEUZh2Dbr6caSq8Mta7baQ8WcX0Et2INC6WQfxAp_1zDbc6uxmGJPlikWUgSIwwsUBkKhy-CPEV8bvmBD_1qjsqkUo1CwSKZbVWSaGwVVzXht4PjTEt16zm-QqJrEEt1NL-cH6feHROBQ5j7S-xyVVZ7f5WE4Fu0ZUugDqIqD712kKPVs7lgdsx6sQAmBiVGdODdA9DiH50gTJlidZgJ57gsxA959DbBRwc6lZv-gJ56JreBZ6WSobxERQQyRjd2bILzuJE-_1F5y3edJ6Pte5bBgDOiTTM-6ZGoRtFy7QNv4RpL1eQ_r3VSrA_g_dBuFqMwp9bHqc6y2LcFHbZGxVq64BxuNBVBG3YOhggmzfzwhV4kZ1JKMH4%3D)
[**CLICK TO WATCH**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=2a2e4da9b71f4984955cc792f5f1e880&_e=w8ubGvXUVuLPbZ2QWSEK89k87aeNgHd61ZpiPx0D7_Blmq5C8zZjQGGQDVfUJXIRnW5BFg5C3YmOY1QcQad1qyIqkuwGLaOv9i4o1UiGdNemEH8Xsb6cDEUZh2Dbr6caSq8Mta7baQ8WcX0Et2INC6WQfxAp_1zDbc6uxmGJPlikWUgSIwwsUBkKhy-CPEV8bvmBD_1qjsqkUo1CwSKZbVWSaGwVVzXht4PjTEt16zm-QqJrEEt1NL-cH6feHROBQ5j7S-xyVVZ7f5WE4Fu0ZZHlNmjgQQCt1CNmpwvXIq9MNvIbPYijXJ8kj5hPz0AkoORplB1fvxYhdPmlg0Htpj4xUsTLUHUhsAGUtBO-6w093qLz8XwmySp7Pz6fqv_LjeEvm3YV5nbEJfooZfEBwq-gtU8X38pzccO48KgN5qayN6SZelBJOQvz_xdpxbvqqmqTjtg-PWWJnv0IFaKg-k6yy_LG1BtqVsjUo3T8Zzc%3D)
In schools, we teach our students the Pledge of Allegiance. But my mother – an immigrant fleeing from socialist Cuba – actually had to learn the Pledge from me!

**But sadly, as the Democrats attempt to radically change the school curriculum and erase American history, parents may soon have to teach their children on their own.**
[**HELP ME STOP THEM**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=2a2e4da9b71f4984955cc792f5f1e880&_e=w8ubGvXUVuLPbZ2QWSEK89k87aeNgHd61ZpiPx0D7_Blmq5C8zZjQGGQDVfUJXIRnW5BFg5C3YmOY1QcQad1qyIqkuwGLaOv9i4o1UiGdNemEH8Xsb6cDEUZh2Dbr6caSq8Mta7baQ8WcX0Et2INC6WQfxAp_1zDbc6uxmGJPlikWUgSIwwsUBkKhy-CPEV8bvmBD_1qjsqkUo1CwSKZbVWSaGwVVzXht4PjTEt16zm-QqJrEEt1NL-cH6feHROBQ5j7S-xyVVZ7f5WE4Fu0ZaPsUCGRMyvYFK_N3g9fyL7JBjO3lR8_geZ12LyhzG5utjjsysljHmzoxBOtwSKgA8ZwZh1eH45ILLeaXlEaSQtMAJve2wQCYO7fOZfvkMttZnsHQK6AfehQ_rrdZl6UnnfCTEQZ85qMIu0Pa147SJ8_G2PVAH37i5JpJ0zPGjgwUvz41JeGtnztN1mqbjPSV7YGuBCIzSKKMq0hCUk0ztM%3D)
That’s why I dedicated an entire ad to the Pledge of Allegiance. It is a symbol of America that every immigrant learns, and as my mother’s son, it holds a special place in my heart.

We MUST defend the Pledge, friend, and everything else we American patriots hold dear. Winning in November will be a huge first step.******But right now, we have to keep ads like this running, and to do that, I need your help.**

clean_body: Election Day is less than a month away. That’s why we just released a brand new ad. Have you seen it yet? | | Friend, Election Day is less than one month away, and that means it's time for our campaign and our supporters to go ALL OUT and finish this thing. That’s why we released a new ad. Have you seen it yet? In schools, we teach our students the Pledge of Allegiance. But my mother – an immigrant fleeing from socialist Cuba – actually had to learn the Pledge from me! But sadly, as the Democrats attempt to radically change the school curriculum and erase American history, parents may soon have to teach their children on their own. That’s why I dedicated an entire ad to the Pledge of Allegiance. It is a symbol of America that every immigrant learns, and as my mother’s son, it holds a special place in my heart. We MUST defend the Pledge, friend, and everything else we American patriots hold dear. Winning in November will be a huge first step.****But right now, we have to keep ads like this running, and to do that, I need your help. Keeping our ads running will be the difference between winning and losing in November. With your contribution today, we are one step closer to our ultimate goal. Thank you for standing with me once again. Thanks, Jason Miyares | | | | Paid for and Authorized by Miyares for Virginia | | Miyares for Virginia 1112 Laskin Rd, Ste A Virginia Beach, VA 23451 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

## Don’t be a Loser
---
Election Integrity is the most important issue facing our Nation right now, bar none! And it is the single issue that is tearing the Republican Party in half. We cannot unite the Party or our country around a lie. Our Party was built on TRUTH! The truth about God, the truth about marriage, the truth about families, the truth about taxes, our economy, our borders, our military... and we MUST include the truth about Elections!PLEASE watch this short video I made in this regard. I’m not asking for your money or your support. I’m simply asking for A MOMENT OF YOUR TIME and the COURAGE to do what is right.

name: Tim
subject: We took a big hit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1122%2E3611125%2EIeaqBa ][IMG]

Folks,

In a minute I will ask you to make a critical donation to my campaign to
help us catch up after a HUGE setback, but first let me explain:

Our campaign runs a lot of digital ads -- it’s one of the best ways we can
compete against attacks from my opponents. When we had to take down events
during my COVID quarantine, our numbers plummeted so we relied on digital
ads to make up the difference.

But when Facebook went down this week, our fundraising completely fell off
a cliff. I’m not kidding -- we lost about $15,000. Now we’re scrambling to
catch up.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5045?t=1007&akid=1122%2E3611125%2EIeaqBa ]We’re running WAY behind on our monthly goal -- can I count on you to
chip in $25 to make up for lost ground?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5045?t=1008&akid=1122%2E3611125%2EIeaqBa ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5046?t=1009&akid=1122%2E3611125%2EIeaqBa ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5047?t=1010&akid=1122%2E3611125%2EIeaqBa ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5048?t=1011&akid=1122%2E3611125%2EIeaqBa ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5049?t=1012&akid=1122%2E3611125%2EIeaqBa ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5045?t=1013&akid=1122%2E3611125%2EIeaqBa ]Other Amount

My millionaire opponents have the backing of GOP mega-donors who can
easily drown us out online -- I need YOUR help to stay in this fight and
make sure voters hear my message loud and clear.

There’s so much on the line here -- if we don’t flip this seat and expand
the Senate majority, Mitch McConnell will snatch back the gavel and plow
forward with his dangerous agenda. We can’t afford that, folks.

Ohio is standing in McConnell’s way but we won’t have a snowball’s chance
in hell of winning this race if we get drowned out online by the GOP.
That’s why I’m asking:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5045?t=1014&akid=1122%2E3611125%2EIeaqBa ]folks, can I count on you to chip in now to help us fuel our
digital ads and flip this open Senate seat blue?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5045?t=1015&akid=1122%2E3611125%2EIeaqBa ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5046?t=1016&akid=1122%2E3611125%2EIeaqBa ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5047?t=1017&akid=1122%2E3611125%2EIeaqBa ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5048?t=1018&akid=1122%2E3611125%2EIeaqBa ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5049?t=1019&akid=1122%2E3611125%2EIeaqBa ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5045?t=1020&akid=1122%2E3611125%2EIeaqBa ]Other Amount

Thank you for everything you do to power this campaign.

-- Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=1122%2E3611125%2EIeaqBa ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=1122%2E3611125%2EIeaqBa ]click here.

name: Team Nikki
subject: Republicans are attacking Nikki
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

We’re sorry to bother you on the weekend, but this is important.

Since the moment we launched our campaign, Republicans have been on the attack. Just this week, Florida’s Lieutenant Governor spent Thursday campaigning against Nikki for criticizing DeSantis’ handling of COVID-19.

Team, Republicans are scared Nikki will win--and that’s why they’ll be launching non-stop attacks over the next year. Click here to chip in now and help us fight back. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-oct-21?refcode=109fightback]

We can’t let up in the fight, especially now. We already know that DeSantis will spend $150 million on his re-election campaign. Most of that money will go towards attacking Nikki.

His team is already on the offensive, and it’s only going to get worse. We can’t wait until 2022 to fight back.

Thanks for your support.

Team Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Mosely For Congress P

name: DEMOCRACY UNDER ATTACK (via DCCC)
subject: BREAKING: SHOCKING new details on Trump’s corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you CONDEMN Trump for his attempts to overturn the 2020 election and undermine our democracy?
| | | _**CNN BREAKING:
Senate reveals SHOCKING new details into how Trump attempted to overturn 2020 election**_
---
| | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_qfg39-)[Let us know: Do you condemn Trump for his attempts to overturn the 2020 election?

NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
YOUR RESPONSE REQUESTED](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-)
[TELL US YOU CONDEMN TRUMP NOW >>](https://links.e.dccc.)

---

We're OUTRAGED.

The Senate Judiciary Committee just released a brand new report with **STUNNING** details about how Trump and his top cronies tried to overturn the election results:

_\-- Trump asked the Justice Department to undermine the election results**NINE** times,

\-- His White House Chief of Staff pressured government lawyers to investigate **BASELESS** claims of election fraud,

\-- And Trump himself tried to have the Attorney General **FIRED** and replaced with one of his top loyalists._

**With each passing day it becomes clearer just how close Donald Trump and his Republicans came to ending our democracy as we know it.**

And worst of all, we know it could happen again -- because as we write this, it appears Trump is laying the groundwork for a **THIRD** run for the White House.

_Under no circumstances can we let him or his Republicans hold power again._

But we can't hope to stop them unless we know we have steadfast support from every last grassroots Democrat on this team.

**[So we need to know: Do you CONDEMN Trump for his attempts to overturn the 2020 election and push our democracy to its breaking point?](https://links.e.dccc.)**

[TELL US YOU CONDEMN TRUMP NOW >>](https://links.e.dccc.)

Thank you,

DCCC
---

---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45753624&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMDk5MTcxNAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45753624&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMDk5MTcxNAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

| | Derek, I’m sorry — I know it’s late. But I wanted to get one last note out to you tonight.

Our one-weekend match opportunity is almost half over, and I didnt see your contribution on the list yet. _**[If you donate right now, your support will go twice as far →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37345228/310816676/-2023814932?refcode=20211009.8_TM_10BS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzM1NTdjNi02ZDI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vO4bMpwqhHuWb-Xpqmp2DVCwSP0PtlySuzUAO7Sny48=)**_

Look, I’m sure you get a lot of emails asking for donations, but let me just lay out the stakes of this race for you — and I’m sure you’ll agree no race is more important than this one right now.

This election is Donald Trump’s first chance to secure a big win since his defeat in 2020, which is why winning Virginia is part of his 2024 comeback plan. If my opponent wins, Donald Trump and his Republicans will have a huge boost of momentum heading into next year’s midterms and beyond.

And Derek, _there is no race as big as ours this year._

Polls show a deadlocked race, and with just weeks to go, we have a limited amount of time to win over undecided voters.

_**[So please, Derek, I need you with me: chip in any amount right now and your contribution will be matched, dollar for dollar. Will you donate right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37345229/310816677/-2023814932?refcode=20211009.8_TM_10BS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzM1NTdjNi02ZDI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vO4bMpwqhHuWb-Xpqmp2DVCwSP0PtlySuzUAO7Sny48=)**_

Thank you for hearing me out,

Terry | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37345230/310816678/-2023814932?refcode=20211009.8_TM_10BS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzM1NTdjNi02ZDI5LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vO4bMpwqhHuWb-Xpqmp2DVCwSP0PtlySuzUAO7Sny48=)**

body:
Nan knows we can flip the 15th, but we need your help. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9c71de7820b3/join-a-local-labor-day-celebration-tomorrow-5022893?e=400a181d5a)
---
| | |
---
| | | _"Next month, voters in Central Ohio have the opportunity to defeat the corrupt special interests that have been in charge of our state for 30 years. That’s why I’m so excited to knock doors with my friend Allison Russo in the 15th District this weekend."_ -Mayor Nan Whaley
---
|
---
| _**Nan Whaley knows we can flip the 15th.**_ With with hard work and lots of great conversations with voters at their door, we can have a huge impact on the race in these last 26 days. So she's lacing up her sneakers to knock on some doors in Hilliard TOMORROW AT 11:30AM, and inviting you to join!
